1000660274.english: I give thanks for the guidance of the Light.

1000660275.english: Azazel, now it's your turn to be trampled.

1000660276.english: Kyaa, where is that hand reaching for?
1000660276.korean: 꺄악, 저 손이 어디를 향하는 건가요.

1000660277.english: …You can hear me, but you're ignoring me, aren't you?

1000660279.english: How lamentable. If a guardian treats the covenant lightly, how can they be a model for the faithful?
1000660279.korean: 개탄스럽도다. 수호자라는 자가 언약을 가벼이 여기면 어찌 신도들에게 본이 될 수 있겠는가.

1000660280.english: So hand over the binoculars to me and pedal.
1000660280.korean: 그러니 쌍안경을 나에게 넘기고 페달을 밟아라.

1000660281.english: W-wait a moment. This is an important moment right now.

1000660282.english: Do you truly wish for me to use force?!
1000660282.korean: 너는 정녕 내가 무력을 쓰기를 바라느냐!

1000660283.english: W-wait! Saraqael! Kyaa! Where are you touching! Huh? Huh? The boat is—?
1000660283.korean: 자, 잠깐! 사라카엘! 꺄악! 어딜 만지세요! 어? 어? 배가?

1000660288.english: - After the kiss, Angel and I did not exchange many words, but even through our clasped hands we could feel each other's hearts.
1000660288.korean: - 입맞춤 이후 엔젤과 나는 별다른 대화를 나누지 않았지만, 맞잡은 두 손으로도 서로의 마음을 알 수 있었다.

1000660289.english: - My affection for Angel overflowed, and Angel's affection for me overflowed.
1000660289.korean: - 엔젤에 대한 애정이 넘쳐, 엔젤의 나에 대한 애정이 넘쳐.

1000660290.english: - It was a state where dating alone was not enough to endure.

1000660291.english: - I took Angel's hand and led her to a place without people.
1000660291.korean: - 나는 엔젤의 손을 잡아 사람들이 없는 곳으로 이끌었다.

1000660293.english: - Angel followed me without a word.

1000660295.english: What kind of disaster is this?

1000660296.english: If you hadn't been greedy, this wouldn't have happened!
1000660296.korean: 네가 욕심을 부리지 않았다면 이럴 일이 없지 않았겠나!

1000660297.english: It's fortunate we have a change of clothes.

1000660298.english: What about the Savior and Angel?

1000660299.english: Ah, there they are. Hurry, let's follow.

1000660303.english: Yes, I am Veronica, the Inquisitor of the Order and representative of the angels.
1000660303.korean: 네, 교단의 이단심문관이자 천사님들의 대리인인 베로니카입니다.

1000660305.english: Indeed, why did I come here?

1000660308.english: How do I look to you?

1000660311.english: Weren't the two of you supposed to clean the chapel today!
1000660311.korean: 오늘 예배당 청소 두 분이 하시기로 하지 않으셨습니까!

1000660313.english: Until now, even when you both skipped cleaning, Angel, Ramiel, and I covered for you, but today I cannot overlook it!
1000660313.korean: 지금까지 두 분이 청소를 빼먹으셔도 엔젤 님과 라미엘 님, 제가 대신했지만, 오늘만큼은 넘어가지 못합니다!

1000660315.english: That we forgot to clean is an undeniable sin.
1000660315.korean: 우리가 청소를 잊은 것은 명명백백한 죄다.

1000660316.english: On this matter, I can swear in the name of the Order's Judge.
1000660316.korean: 여기에 대해선 교단 심판자의 이름을 걸고 맹세할 수 있다.

1000660317.english: But is it not also a sin to cling to the small while neglecting the greater?
1000660317.korean: 그러나 소에 집착하여 대를 방관하는 것 또한 죄악이 아니겠는가.

1000660318.english: Azazel and I are acting together for the greater glory of the Order. Will you not understand this?
1000660318.korean: 나와 아자젤은 교단의 더 큰 영광을 위하여 함께 행동하는 중이다. 이를 이해해 주지 않겠나?

1000660319.english: May I ask what sacred duty you are on?
1000660319.korean: 무슨 성스러운 임무를 맡으셨는지 여쭤봐도 되겠습니까?

1000660320.english: It is to watch over whether our little lower-rank angel faithfully carries out the heavy mission of her date with the Savior.
1000660320.korean: 우리의 작은 지품천사가 구원자와의 데이트라는 막중한 임무를 잘 수행하는지 지켜보는 일이다.

1000660321.english: …So you are saying you skipped cleaning the chapel to spy on the Savior and Angel's date.
1000660321.korean: ......구원자님과 엔젤 님의 데이트를 훔쳐보신다고 예배당 청소를 빼먹었다는 말씀이시군요.

1000660322.english: Both of you, come with me!

1000660323.english: Wait a moment! Angel is about to receive the Savior's blessing!
1000660323.korean: 잠깐만요! 엔젤이 구원자께 축복을 받는단 말이에요.

1000660324.english: Yes, truly a joyous occasion. But what does that have to do with cleaning?
1000660324.korean: 예, 참 경사스럽군요. 그러나 그거랑 청소랑은 상관없지요?

1000660325.english: What is more important, Angel's blessing or cleaning!

1000660326.english: Lady Angel receiving her blessing will happen even without the two of you, but cleaning the chapel cannot be done without you, can it!
1000660326.korean: 엔젤 님께서 축복을 받는 건 두 분이 안 계셔도 일어나는 일이지만, 예배당 청소는 두 분이 계시지 않으면 안 되는 일이지 않습니까!

1000660327.english: An Inquisitor daring to go against the will of the Judge!

1000660330.english: I am about to lose my composure.
1000660330.korean: 저는 지금 냉정함을 잃으려 하고 있습니다.

1000660331.english: - I took out a silver tray from my room and placed cookies upon it.
1000660331.korean: - 저는 제 방에 있는 은쟁반을 꺼내 그 위에 쿠키를 올려놓았습니다.

1000660332.english: - They are angel-shaped cookies that my partner gifted me yesterday.
1000660332.korean: - 어제 반려님께서 저에게 선물해주신 천사 모양 쿠키입니다.

1000660333.english: - The silver tray… I brought it from the Kagoshima branch…
1000660333.korean: - 은쟁반은... 제가 가고시마 지부에서 가져온 것...

1000660334.english: - It was used back in the Kagoshima branch… when we mourned Azazel… my sister, the little angel, and the believers.
1000660334.korean: - 가고시마 지부에 있었던... 아자젤... 언니와 꼬마 천사님, 신도분들을 추모할 때 썼던 물건입니다.

1000660335.english: - I knelt before the silver tray and prayed.
1000660335.korean: - 저는 은쟁반 앞에 무릎을 꿇고 기도를 했습니다.

1000660336.english: Sister. How is the embrace of the Light?

1000660337.english: Hehe, I asked something I need not have asked.
1000660337.korean: 헤헤, 여쭙지 않아도 될 걸 여쭸네요.

1000660339.english: As you know, everyone aboard the Orca is good-hearted.
1000660339.korean: 아시다시피 오르카 호의 모든 분들은 좋은 분들이세요.

1000660340.english: The Orca's Kohei Order members also care for me very much.
1000660340.korean: 오르카 호 코헤이 교단 사람들도 저를 무척이나 아껴주신답니다.

1000660341.english: And above all else… the Savior… my partner…

1000660342.english: Hehe, the representative of the Light is truly a wonderful person.
1000660342.korean: 헤헤, 빛의 대리인이신 그분은 무척 훌륭한 분이세요.

1000660343.english: When I first saw him, I held hope that the world would be saved again.
1000660343.korean: 그분을 뵈었을 때 저는 다시 세상이 구원받을 거라고 희망을 품었는데.

1000660344.english: Now that hope has become certainty.

1000660345.english: And… just yesterday I went on a date with him… and was loved.
1000660345.korean: 그리고... 바로 어제 그분과 데이트를 하고... 사랑받았어요.

1000660346.english: Hehehe, I trust you can understand why I cannot go into detail?
1000660346.korean: 헤헤헤, 자세히 이야기하지 못하는 건 이해해 주실 수 있으시죠?

1000660350.english: ......I'm sorry. I won't cry. It was just that longing briefly overflowed.
1000660350.korean: ......죄송해요. 울지 않을게요. 잠시 그리움이 넘쳤을 뿐이에요.

1000660351.english: Now is not the time to cry and dwell on the past, but to smile, strengthen my resolve, and move forward into the future.
1000660351.korean: 지금은 울면서 과거를 그리기보다는 웃고 의지를 다지며 미래로 나아가야 할 때이니까요.

1000660352.english: But I will never forget you, Sister. Nor the little angel, nor the other believers.
1000660352.korean: 하지만 결코 언니를 잊지 않을 거예요. 꼬마 천사님도, 다른 신도분들도.

1000660353.english: Until the day I leave behind a world saved and am embraced in the Light once more to reunite with everyone.
1000660353.korean: 미래에 구원받은 세상을 뒤로하고 빛의 품에 안겨서 다시 모두를 만날 그때까지.

1000660354.english: Until then, Angel, the lesser angel of Kohei, will spread the teachings of the Light on earth and attend the Savior.
1000660354.korean: 그때까지 코헤이의 지품 천사 엔젤은 지상에 빛의 가르침을 알리고 구원자님을 보좌하겠어요.

1000660355.english: May this world once again be filled with the blessing and glory of the Light.
1000660355.korean: 이 세계에 다시 한 번 빛의 축복과 영광이 가득하기를.

1000660356.english: - After finishing my prayer, I took the remaining cookies and headed to the chapel.
1000660356.korean: - 기도를 마치고 남은 과자를 들고 예배당으로 향했습니다.

1000660357.english: - Inside the brilliantly cleaned chapel were Lady Azazel, Lord Saraqael, Lord Ramiel, and Lady Veronica.
1000660357.korean: - 번쩍번쩍하게 청소한 예배당에는 아자젤 님과 사라카엘 님, 라미엘 님, 베로니카 님이 계셨습니다.

1000660358.english: Everyone, I have cookies the Savior gave me yesterday. Would you like to share them?
1000660358.korean: 여러분, 어제 구원자님께 받은 과자가 있는데 같이 드시지 않으시겠어요?

1000660359.english: - A tea party began on the spot.

1000660360.english: - We sat together, drinking tea and eating cookies.
1000660360.korean: - 우리는 둘러앉아 차를 마시고 과자를 먹었습니다.

1000660361.english: - At my sides sat Lady Azazel and Lord Saraqael.
1000660361.korean: - 저의 양옆에는 아자젤 님과 사라카엘 님께서 앉으셨습니다.

1000660362.english: - Lady Azazel, who at times shows clumsy sides.
1000660362.korean: - 가끔은 서투른 모습을 보여주시는 아자젤 님.

1000660363.english: - Lord Saraqael, who at times is excessively rigid.
1000660363.korean: - 지나칠 정도로 고지식한 면이 있으신 사라카엘 님.

1000660364.english: - Yet in both of their hearts toward me I can feel pure trust and affection, untainted and unwavering.
1000660364.korean: - 그러나 두 분의 저를 향한 마음에는 한치의 오점과 흐트러짐도 없는 순수한 신뢰와 애정이 느껴집니다.

1000660365.english: - Sometimes this overflows and leads them to act childishly… but I know this too is born of their goodwill, so I can never resent it.
1000660365.korean: - 때때로 이게 과해서 철부지 같은 행동을 하실 때도 있지만...이 또한 두 분의 호의임을 알기에 결코 미워할 수 없습니다.

1000660368.english: - At times, because of their behavior, I almost want to forget my place and act spoiled.
1000660368.korean: - 두 분의 태도에 가끔은 제 위치를 잊고 어리광을 부리고 싶어질 정도입니다.

1000660371.english: I'm just happy… sitting like this, eating cookies together feels like family.
1000660371.korean: 이렇게 둘러앉아서 함께 과자를 먹는 게 가족 같아서 즐거워요.

1000660372.english: But aren't we already bound by the strong tie of Kohei?
1000660372.korean: 우리는 이미 코헤이라는 끈끈한 연으로 묶여 있지 않나요.

1000660373.english: If only we truly were family, then I could at least punish certain people who slack off…
1000660373.korean: 차라리 가족이었으면 농땡이부리는 누구분들을 체벌할 수라도 있을 텐데...

1000660375.english: The Light has said, "It is hard to gain grace through the mouth, but easy to bring harm, so restrain yourself firmly." Thus, according to the teaching of the Light, I shall remain silent.
1000660375.korean: 빛께서 이르시되 ‘입으로 은혜를 입는 것을 어려우나 해를 입는 것은 쉬우니 단단히 단속하라’ 하시니 빛의 가르침에 따라 침묵하겠습니다.

1000660378.english: - With a benevolent smile, she gently patted my head.
1000660378.korean: - 자애로운 웃음을 지으시며 저의 머리를 쓰다듬어주셨습니다.

1000660379.english: - That touch was so kind and warm, it reminded me of the days when my sister would pat my head.
1000660379.korean: - 그 손길은 무척이나 다정하고 따뜻해서, 그 옛날 언니께서 저의 머리를 쓰다듬어주시던 것을 떠올리게 했습니다.

1000660381.english: I never thought I'd end up working overtime for something that isn't even work.
1000660381.korean: 내가 업무도 아닌 일로 이렇게 야근을 할 줄은 몰랐네.

1000660382.english: And not because anyone made me, but because I did it voluntarily!
1000660382.korean: 그것도 누가 시켜서 하는 게 아니라 내가 자발적으로!

1000660383.english: Oh, Orangeade, Orangeade, why do you insist on making life so hard for yourself!
1000660383.korean: 오렌지에이드야, 오렌지에이드야, 너는 왜 그리 사서 고생하니!

1000660384.english: Honestly, I should leave the computer usage logs and claim overtime pay!
1000660384.korean: 정말이지, 컴퓨터 사용기록 남겨서 야근수당 신청할까 보다!

1000660385.english: Hehe, but after days of effort, I've finally completed it.
1000660385.korean: 헤헤, 그래도 며칠 고생한 끝에 드디어 완성했다.

1000660387.english: "Ah! You too can do it. The Practical Dating Guidebook by Romance Expert Orangeade"!
1000660387.korean: ‘앗! 당신도 할 수 있다. 연애 전문가 오렌지에이드의 실전 데이트 교본’!

1000660388.english: Hehe, this guidebook is the fruit of the experience I've accumulated reading 10,000 romantic comedy manga, compiled using big data technology...
1000660388.korean: 후후, 이 교본으로 말하자면 내가 1만 권의 러브 코미디 만화를 읽으면서 축적한 경험을 빅데이터기술로 정리하여...

1000660389.english: A guide that helps you choose the best move in any situation that can happen during a date.
1000660389.korean: 데이트 중에 일어날 수 있는 모든 상황에서 최선의 수를 선택할 수 있게 도와주는 가이드 북.

1000660390.english: If published, it would shake the very foundations of Orca's romantic landscape and let me live proudly atop a pile of tuna cans.
1000660390.korean: 출판하면 오르카 호의 연애 구도에 대파란을 일으키고 내가 참치캔 더미 위에서 떵떵거리면서 살 수 있게 해줄 금단의 문서.

1000660391.english: I created it, but truly, it is terrifying. Orangeade… such a scary child!
1000660391.korean: 내가 만들었지만 실로 두렵기 그지없다. 오렌지에이드...무서운 아이!

1000660392.english: Hehe, what are you even saying, me.

1000660393.english: Sigh. I stayed up so many nights making this that my mind is going fuzzy.
1000660393.korean: 하아. 이거 만든다고 며칠 밤샘을 했더니 정신이 오락가락하네.

1000660394.english: What time is it now… huh?! 4 a.m., the time when people are at their most deranged!
1000660394.korean: 지금 몇 시... 헉! 사람이 가장 정신이 맛이 간다는 새벽 4시!

1000660395.english: This is bad, tomorrow… no, it's already past midnight, so today. I have a date today!
1000660395.korean: 큰일났다, 내일... 아니, 자정 지났으니 오늘. 오늘 데이트 있는데!

1000660396.english: I need to sleep quickly. Ah, no, I should clean my room first, no, wait, my skin must be in bad shape, maybe I should do a face mask first?
1000660396.korean: 빨리 자야지. 아, 아니, 우선 방부터 치우고, 아니다 피부 상태가 안 좋을 테니 팩부터 하는 게 좋을까?

1000660397.english: I need to check the clothes and accessories I'll wear today, no, the bathroom first…
1000660397.korean: 오늘 입을 옷이랑 장신구도 확인해야 하는데, 아니 화장실부터...

1000660399.english: At this hour, who could it be? Yes! Who is it?

1000660401.english: Vanilla, what brings you here at this hour?
1000660401.korean: 바닐라 씨, 이 시간에는 무슨 일이신가요?

1000660402.english: Could you please be a little quiet?

1000660403.english: A complaint came in during the patrol.

1000660407.english: Hahaha. Guess I got too excited. Okay. Let's relax, quietly, step by step, one by one, let's handle it.
1000660407.korean: 하하하. 너무 흥분했나보네. 자. 릴렉스하고 조용조용히 차근차근 하나하나씩 처리하자.

1000660409.english: Tidying done, sleeping pack OK, restroom visit done, today's outfit checked. Now only sleep is left.
1000660409.korean: 정리 끝, 슬리핑 팩 OK, 화장실은 갔다 왔고, 오늘 코디도 확인 완료. 이제 자는 일만 남았네.

1000660412.english: Haa. I'm really, really, truly, extremely looking forward to today's date.
1000660412.korean: 하아. 오늘 데이트 정말정말 진짜로 엄청 기대된다.

1000660413.english: With the date plan I've carefully prepared, the Commander will surely fall head over heels for me.
1000660413.korean: 내가 심혈을 기울여 세운 데이트 플랜이라면 사령관님도 나에게 뿅 가실 게 분명해.

1000660414.english: When the date reaches its climax and the atmosphere ripens, the Commander will take my hand and say this.
1000660414.korean: 데이트가 막바지로 접어들고 분위기가 무르익을 무렵에 사령관님께선 내 손을 잡고 이렇게 말씀하시겠지.

1000660415.english: ‘Orangeade, this is the first date that has shaken my heart like this.'
1000660415.korean: ‘오렌지에이드, 이렇게 내 마음을 흔드는 데이트는 처음이야.’

1000660416.english: ‘I'll never send you on outside duty again. From now on, always stay by my side doing office work...'
1000660416.korean: ‘다시는 외근은 안 시킬게. 앞으로 쭈욱 내 곁에서 내근해주지 않을...’

1000660419.english: - The day of the date with Orangeade.

1000660420.english: - Arrived at the promised place 20 minutes early and waited for Orangeade, but Orangeade did not come.
1000660420.korean: - 미리 20분 전에 약속장소에 도착해서 오렌지에이드를 기다렸지만, 오렌지에이드는 오지 않았다.

1000660421.english: - Even when the appointed time came, even after 30 minutes had passed.
1000660421.korean: - 약속 시간이 되어도, 약속 시간으로부터 30분이 지나도.

1000660422.english: - Though Orangeade is talkative, she's a capable and diligent member.
1000660422.korean: - 오렌지에이드가 말이 많기는 해도 유능하고 성실한 대원인데.

1000660423.english: - The moment I decided to go to Orangeade's room.

1000660426.english: - Instead of her usual uniform, Orangeade was fully dressed up from head to toe.
1000660426.korean: - 오렌지에이드는 평소의 정장이 아닌 머리끝에서부터 발끝까지 풀코디한 모습이었다.

1000660427.english: - But before I could even take a good look, she reached me and bent over, catching her breath.
1000660427.korean: - 그러나 내가 자세히 볼 틈도 없이 내 앞에 도달한 오렌지에이드는 허리를 숙여 숨을 골랐다.

1000660428.english: Huff! Huff! Did you huff! wait long, Com… huff! mander?
1000660428.korean: 헉! 헉! 기다리 헉! 셨어요, 사령 헉! 관님?

1000660429.english: - Orangeade nodded and took a long while to steady her breathing.
1000660429.korean: - 오렌지에이드는 고개를 끄덕이고 한참 숨을 골랐다.

1000660430.english: You just arrived? Whew, thank goodness. I got caught up worrying about this and that, and before I knew it, time flew.
1000660430.korean: 방금 오셨다구요? 휴, 다행이다. 이것저것 신경 쓰다 보니 어느새 시간이 이렇게 됐더라구요.

1000660432.english: - The redness in Orangeade's face wasn't just from running here.
1000660432.korean: - 오렌지에이드의 얼굴이 붉은 것은 단지 달려와서 그런 것만은 아닐 것이다.

1000660433.english: Commander, really. You must make a lot of women cry. You womanizer, you.
1000660433.korean: 사령관님도 참. 여자 많이 울리시겠어요. 이 바람둥이 같으니.

1000660434.english: - Even though this is a situation she's seriously stressing about out of necessity!
1000660434.korean: - 불가항력에 필수불가결이긴하지만 엄청 신경쓰고 있는 상황인데!

1000660436.english: But you're always worrying and working hard for us, aren't you?
1000660436.korean: 하지만 평소 저희들을 위해서 여러모로 고민하고 애쓰고 계시죠?

1000660437.english: This is Orangeade's consideration just for you, Commander!

1000660439.english: Please leave today's date to me.

1000660440.english: I, Orangeade! An elite romance expert who has devoured 10,000 love-comedy mangas!
1000660440.korean: 저 오렌지에이드! 1만 권의 러브 코미디 만화를 탐독한 엘리트 연애 전문가!

1000660441.english: I'll make today's date beautiful, lovely, and perfect-the best date ever!
1000660441.korean: 뷰티풀하고 러블리하고 퍼펙트하게 오늘의 데이트를 최고의 데이트로 만들어보이겠어요!

1000660445.korean: - 오렌지에이드는 손가락을 두 개 펴 보였다.

1000660446.english: If you count the home date last time, then it's the second!
1000660446.korean: 지난번 홈 데이트도 포함하면 두 번째!

1000660447.english: - She must mean the time we watched manga together in my room.
1000660447.korean: - 아마 지난번에 내 방에서 같이 만화를 봤던 것을 말하는 거겠지.

1000660448.english: With both theory and experience, I'm invincible!
1000660448.korean: 이론과 경험 둘 다 갖춘 저는 무적이라구요!

1000660449.english: - Saying that, Orangeade gently took my hand.
1000660449.korean: - 그렇게 말하고 오렌지에이드는 슬그머니 내 손을 잡았다.

1000660450.english: Hehe, today was supposed to be a workday, but getting to play instead makes me happy. This date counts as official leave, right?
1000660450.korean: 헤헤, 원래 오늘은 일하는 날인데 놀게 되니 좋아요. 오늘 데이트는 공가로 인정되는 거죠?

1000660451.english: Though even if it's not leave but considered part of work, that's fine too. This could be a kind of field duty, right?
1000660451.korean: 공가가 아니라 업무의 일환이라고 해도 좋지만요. 이것도 외근의 일종이겠죠?

1000660452.english: May every field duty be no better or worse, but always the same as a date with you, Commander.
1000660452.korean: 모든 외근이 더는 좋고 덜은 싫고 사령관님과의 데이트만 같아라.

1000660453.english: - Even if she acted like she was flattering or scheming, Orangeade's words and actions weren't annoying at all.
1000660453.korean: - 아부 떨고, 잔꾀 부리는 것처럼 행동해도 오렌지에이드의 언행은 전혀 얄밉지 않았다.

1000660454.english: - Regardless of all her chatter, apart from her being diligent and capable.
1000660454.korean: - 이런저런 소리를 해도 그녀가 성실하고 능력이 있는 것과는 별개로.

1000660455.english: - It must be her pure nature that draws people in.
1000660455.korean: - 그녀의 순수한 본질이 사람을 잡아끄는 매력이 있기 때문이겠지.

1000660457.english: The date course I prepared, you're excited, right? It's going to be a truly special day!
1000660457.korean: 제가 준비한 데이트 코스, 기대되시죠? 정말 특별한 날이 될 거예요!

1000660458.english: - Orangeade and I went to the theater.

1000660459.english: - Strictly speaking, it was more like an audiovisual room...

1000660460.english: Today's movie is based on a manga that I really really really really really really love!
1000660460.korean: 오늘의 영화는 제가 정말정말정말정말정말정말! 좋아하는 만화를 원작으로 하는 영화에요.

1000660461.english: Do you know how excited I was when I found out my favorite manga was getting a movie adaptation?
1000660461.korean: 제가 좋아하는 만화가 영화로 만들어졌다는 것을 알게 되었을 때 제가 얼마나 기대 했는지 아세요?

1000660462.english: I really wanted to see it, but since the data was lost, I half gave up. But when I checked the Ark's archives... what on earth!? Why are you here!?
1000660462.korean: 무척 보고 싶었지만, 데이터가 소실되어서 반쯤 포기하고 있었는데, 여기 방주에서 찾아보니... 웬일이니!? 네가 왜 여기 있니!?

1000660463.english: I even forgot I was sneaking around instead of doing data sorting and analysis, cheered loudly, and got scolded by Alpha. Hehe.
1000660463.korean: 데이터 정리랑 분석하던 중에 몰래 딴짓하는 중이라는 것도 잊고 환호했다가 알파 님께 혼났어요. 헤헤.

1000660464.english: But with this and that going on, I hadn't been able to watch it until now.
1000660464.korean: 그런데 이런저런 일이 있어서 지금까지 못 보고 있었는데.

1000660465.english: Being able to see it together with you, Commander, makes me so happy.
1000660465.korean: 이렇게 사령관님과 같이 볼 수 있게 되어서 얼마나 기쁜지 몰라요.

1000660466.english: Commander, have you ever read the original manga of this movie?
1000660466.korean: 사령관님은 이 영화의 원작 만화를 보신 적 있으신가요?

1000660467.english: I'll lend you the manga later. I know you'll like it too.
1000660467.korean: 나중에 만화책 빌려드릴게요. 사령관님도 좋아하실 거예요.

1000660468.english: Hehe, I talked too long. At this rate, I'll end up spoiling it.
1000660468.korean: 헤헤, 말이 너무 길어졌네요. 이러다가 스포일러하겠어요.

1000660469.english: Now, Commander. Let's enjoy this masterpiece of the century together.
1000660469.korean: 자, 사령관님. 같이 세기의 명작을 감상하자고요.

1000660471.english: What is this disaster of a movie!

1000660472.english: - Orangeade shouted as the ending credits rolled.
1000660472.korean: - 영화 엔딩 크레딧이 올라오는 것을 보며 오렌지에이드가 외쳤다.

1000660473.english: They completely changed the original plot as they pleased, the actors are nothing like the original, they throw in hints but never resolve them, and there are so many useless scenes and lines.
1000660473.korean: 원작 플롯을 자기 멋대로 바꿔, 배우들은 원작이랑 전혀 달라, 떡밥은 뿌리기만 하고 회수하지도 않아, 쓸모없는 장면과 대사도 많아.

1000660474.english: No, but why is the music so good, then?
1000660474.korean: 아니, 그런 주제에 음악은 왜 그리 좋대요?

1000660475.english: This movie is based on the manga I really really really really really really love, and they ruined it like this!
1000660475.korean: 제가 정말정말정말정말정말정말 좋아하는 만화를 원작으로 하는 영화인데 그걸 이런 식으로 망치다니!

1000660476.english: The screenwriter, the director, the investors, the actors, the staff, and who else... anyway, composer, please step outside if you don't want to get scolded.
1000660476.korean: 영화각본가랑 감독이랑 투자자랑 배우랑 스태프랑 또 누가 있냐... 일단 작곡가님은 여기서 나가 있으세요, 혼나기 싫으시면.

1000660477.english: - After the movie, Orangeade was angry and poured out harsh criticism about it.
1000660477.korean: - 영화를 보고 난 후 오렌지에이드는 화가 나서 영화에 대한 혹평을 늘어놓았다.

1000660478.english: - When something you looked forward to turns out far worse than expected, the disappointment matches the expectation.
1000660478.korean: - 기대하던 것이 상상 이상으로 졸작이면 기대한 만큼 실망하는 법이겠지.

1000660479.english: - Normally talkative, Orangeade became even more so once excited.
1000660479.korean: - 원래 말이 많은 오렌지에이드는 흥분하자 평소보다 더 말이 많아졌다.

1000660480.english: - She fired off words like a machine gun, and it seemed like there was no way to calm her down.
1000660480.korean: - 기관총처럼 말을 쏟아내는 오렌지에이드를 진정시키는 방법은 없을 것처럼 보이지만.

1000660481.english: - But I knew well how to calm Orangeade.
1000660481.korean: - 나는 오렌지에이드를 진정시키는 방법을 잘 알고 있었다.

1000660482.english: I'm Tomatoade full of anger! Throw rotten tomatoes at that trash movie!
1000660482.korean: 나는 화가 잔뜩 난 토마토에이드다! 저 망작에 썩은 토마토를 던져라!

1000660483.english: - I patted Orangeade on the head.

1000660484.english: - Her head was warm with heat.

1000660486.english: - As I stroked her head, Orangeade instantly quieted down like a kitten picked up by the scruff.
1000660486.korean: - 내가 머리를 쓰다듬자 오렌지에이드는 목덜미를 물린 새끼 고양이처럼 순식간에 얌전해졌다.

1000660487.english: - Just as I thought she might actually start purring like a cat, Orangeade spoke.
1000660487.korean: - 이러다가 정말로 고양이처럼 그릉그릉거릴지도 모르겠다고 생각했을 때 오렌지에이드가 입을 열었다.

1000660488.english: Hing, I wanted to show only good things to you, Commander.
1000660488.korean: 힝, 사령관님한테는 좋은 것만 보여드리고 싶었는데.

1000660489.english: - At her words, I unconsciously pulled Orangeade into my arms.
1000660489.korean: - 오렌지에이드의 말에 나는 나도 모르게 오렌지에이드를 끌어안았다.

1000660491.english: - She gave a small scream and froze, but soon embraced me back.
1000660491.korean: - 오렌지에이드는 작게 비명을 지르고 몸을 굳혔으나, 이내 나를 마주 안았다.

1000660492.english: Eheheh... What's this, Commander. We're still in the middle of our date, you know.
1000660492.korean: 에헤헷... 왜 이러세요, 사령관님. 아직 한창 데이트 중이잖아요.

1000660493.english: - Orangeade gently slipped out of my arms.

1000660494.english: - After a few deep breaths, she returned to her usual self and said to me.
1000660494.korean: - 오렌지에이드는 몇 번 심호흡 끝에 평소의 모습으로 돌아온 후 나에게 말했다.

1000660495.english: The day is long, and the night is still far away, Commander.
1000660495.korean: 낮은 길고, 밤은 아직 멀었어요, 사령관님.

1000660496.english: Girl Orangeade. I'll make sure the rest of this date succeeds for certain!
1000660496.korean: 소녀 오렌지에이드. 남은 데이트만큼은 확실하게 성공시켜 보일게요!

1000660499.english: - In front of us was a long line.
1000660499.korean: - 우리 앞에는 길게 늘어선 줄이 있었다.

1000660500.english: This is the most popular waffle shop these days.
1000660500.korean: 요즘 제일 인기 있는 와플 가게에요.

1000660501.english: Crispy on the outside, moist on the inside, with crunchy sugar chunks here and there, topped with whipped cream, fruit, and loads of chocolate-it's a paradise of flavor!
1000660501.korean: 겉은 바삭, 속은 촉촉, 그리고 중간중간에 오독오독 씹히는 사탕 덩어리가 들어간 와플 위에 생크림, 과일, 초콜릿이 듬뿍 올린 맛의 파라다이스!

1000660502.english: It's the hot dessert right now-just posting a photo on Social Orca gets you tons of likes.
1000660502.korean: 요즘 소셜 오르카에 사진만 올려도 좋아요를 잔뜩 받을 수 있는 화제의 디저트라구요.

1000660503.english: - Social Orca is a recently launched SNS.
1000660503.korean: - 소셜 오르카라면 최근에 서비스를 시작한 SNS다.

1000660505.english: Ah... I do want to, but...

1000660506.english: A lot of the work I handle is related to classified information, right?
1000660506.korean: 제가 맡은 일이 기밀과 관련된 게 많잖아요?

1000660507.english: If I carelessly post something and leak a secret, the consequences would be huge.
1000660507.korean: 괜히 이런저런 글 올리다가 실수해서 기밀 유출하면 그 여파가 엄청날 거 아니에요.

1000660508.english: So I hold back and just lurk.
1000660508.korean: 그래서 꾹 참고 그냥 눈팅만 하고 있죠.

1000660509.english: Hehe. Actually, Alpha told me to be careful.
1000660509.korean: 헤헤. 사실 알파 님께서 조심하라고 말씀해주셨거든요.

1000660510.english: Ah, but Commander, don't you use SNS?
1000660510.korean: 아, 그런데 사령관님께선 SNS 안 하세요?

1000660511.english: - Steel Line Online Information Board Secret Network...

1000660512.english: - But I've never posted there, though there are tons of posts about me. Should I call that "using it," or "being used by it"...?
1000660512.korean: - 그런데 내가 글 올린 적은 없는데 나에 대한 글은 잔뜩 올라오니, 이걸 한다고 해야 하나, 당해야 한다고 해야 하나...

1000660513.english: Then how about trying it out? If you post selfies, essays, or even emotional poems, it'll really boost the squad's morale.
1000660513.korean: 그러면 해보실래요? 사령관님의 셀카라든가, 사설이라던가, 감성이 넘치는 시 같은 것을 올리시면 대원들 사기가 엄청 올라갈 거 같은데요.

1000660514.english: They say strike while the iron is hot, right? I'll help you.
1000660514.korean: 쇠뿔도 단김에 빼라고 하죠? 제가 도와드릴게요.

1000660515.english: - While waiting in line for the waffle shop, I created and set up a Social Orca account with Orangeade's help.
1000660515.korean: - 나는 와플 가게 줄에 선 채로 오렌지에이드의 도움을 받아 소셜 오르카 계정을 만들고 세팅했다.

1000660516.english: And with that, account creation and setup complete!

1000660517.english: You'll have to post carefully since it'll go down in history.
1000660517.korean: 역사에 길이 남을 테니 신중하게 올리셔야 해요.

1000660518.english: What are you saying, Commander. You are the leader of Orca, the last and the first human!
1000660518.korean: 무슨 말씀이세요. 사령관님. 사령관님께선 오르카의 지도자이자, 마지막이자 최초의 인간님!

1000660519.english: This may be a small post for one human, but for humanity it's a great leap!
1000660519.korean: 이것은 한 분의 인간님에게는 작은 글이지만, 인류에게는 위대한 도약!

1000660520.english: Someday when an Information Museum is built, it will surely say, "This was the first SNS post by the human."
1000660520.korean: 훗날에 정보박물관이 생기면 ‘이 글이 최초의 인간님의 첫 SNS글이란다.’ 라고 기록될 게 분명하다고요.

1000660521.english: - Even as we discussed what my first post should be, the line steadily moved forward.
1000660521.korean: - 우리가 내 계정에 올릴 첫 글을 무엇으로 할지 의논하는 중에도 줄은 차근차근 줄어들었다.

1000660522.english: - And when it was finally our turn...

1000660524.english: - As our turn came, a "sold out" sign was put up.
1000660524.korean: - 우리 차례가 되자 품절 표시가 올라왔다.

1000660526.english: - Orangeade shouted in front of the stall.

1000660527.english: Why? Why right before us? Without the slightest lie? Isn't this a mistake? Could this be Pex's scheme? Otherwise, how could this happen!?
1000660527.korean: 어째서? 왜 하필 우리 앞에서? 일말의 거짓도 없이? 착각은 아닌가요? 이거 혹시 펙스의 공작? 그렇지 않고서 이런 일이 일어날 리 없는데!?

1000660528.english: - Orangeade looked ready to keep shouting for a while.

1000660532.english: I really wanted you to taste it, Commander.

1000660533.english: - To comfort her, I patted her head a bit more.
1000660533.korean: - 나는 오렌지에이드를 위로해주기 위해 좀 더 머리를 쓰다듬어주었다.

1000660534.english: - Then I realized-when it comes to desserts, isn't there someone nearby who makes them better than anyone?
1000660534.korean: - 생각해보니 디저트라면 누구보다도 잘 만드는 사람이 근처에 있잖아?

1000660537.english: - We ordered waffles at Café Horizon.

1000660538.english: - Aurora, who made and served the waffles, looked at me and Orangeade with eyes full of envy.
1000660538.korean: - 와플을 만들고 서빙을 한 아우로라는 부러움이 가득한 눈으로 나와 오렌지에이드를 바라보았다.

1000660539.english: How nice, Orangeade. I wanted to go on a date with the Commander too.
1000660539.korean: 좋겠다, 오렌지에이드. 나도 사령관이랑 데이트 하고 싶었는데.

1000660541.english: So, how does it feel, dating the Commander?

1000660542.english: How could I possibly describe this feeling in just a word or two?
1000660542.korean: 이 기분을 어떻게 한두 마디로 표현할 수 있을까요?

1000660543.english: I'm jealous... you'll have to tell me all about it later, okay?
1000660543.korean: 부럽다... 나중에 자세히 이야기해 줘야 해. 알았지?

1000660545.english: I'll be waiting for your story, Orangeade.

1000660547.english: - Aurora said brightly and went back to work.

1000660548.english: - As I watched her back, I felt someone's gaze, and when I turned my head...
1000660548.korean: - 그 뒷모습을 보고 있다가 시선이 느껴져서 고개를 돌리니.

1000660550.english: When on a date, isn't it proper manners to pay attention only to your partner?
1000660550.korean: 데이트할 때는 상대만 신경 쓰는 게 매너잖아요.

1000660552.english: - In this case, a quick apology would be better than an excuse.

1000660553.english: - Orangeade narrowed her eyes, then let out a sigh.
1000660553.korean: - 오렌지에이드는 눈을 가늘게 뜨다가 한숨을 쉬었다.

1000660554.english: It can't be helped. You're the only man, the last and the first human.
1000660554.korean: 어쩔 수 없죠. 사령관님께선 유일한 남성 마지막이자 최초의 인간님이시니까요.

1000660555.english: But still... today... please look only at me.

1000660557.english: Hehe, I'm always Orangeade just for you, Commander.
1000660557.korean: 헤헤, 저는 언제나 사령관님만을 위한 오렌지에이드에요.

1000660558.english: - After exchanging a few lines that sounded like those of a sappy couple, we turned our attention to the waffles Aurora made.
1000660558.korean: - 잠시 닭살 커플 같은 말을 주고받은 후에 우리는 아우로라가 만든 와플로 신경을 돌렸다.

1000660559.english: As expected of top pâtissière Aurora!

1000660560.english: Perfectly golden and deliciously baked waffles, decorated with ice cream, sauces, fruits, whipped cream, and various toppings in exquisite balance, satisfying both appetite and aesthetics.
1000660560.korean: 노릇노릇 먹음직스럽게 잘 구워진 와플에 아이스크림, 소스, 과일, 생크림을 비롯한 다양한 토핑을 절묘하게 장식하여 식욕과 미적 감각을 동시에 충족시키네요.

1000660561.english: A paradigm-shifting masterpiece proving that waffles can be more than a snack-they can be art!
1000660561.korean: 와플이 단순한 간식이 아닌 예술작품이 될 수 있다는 것을 증명하는, 패러다임을 흔드는 역작!

1000660562.english: - Compared to Orangeade's words, my expression was lacking.
1000660562.korean: - 오렌지에이드에 비해서 나의 표현이 너무 빈약했다.

1000660563.english: - As I wondered how I could make my words richer, one idea suddenly came to me.
1000660563.korean: - 나는 어떻게 더 표현을 풍부하게 해볼까 하다가 문득 한 가지 방법에 생각이 미쳤다.

1000660565.english: - Even if it ends up preserved in the Information Museum someday, this much should be fine.
1000660565.korean: - 나중에 정보박물관에 박제가 되더라도 이 정도는 괜찮겠지.

1000660566.english: - It would show that even in hard times, we still had hope and joy.
1000660566.korean: - 험난한 시기에도 우리가 희망을 가지고 즐겁게 지냈다는 모습을 보여줄 수 있을 테니까.

1000660567.english: That's a great idea. Let's take it right now!

1000660568.english: - We carefully took a photo to make the waffles look as pretty and tasty as possible, then uploaded it to the account.
1000660568.korean: - 우리는 심혈을 기울여 와플이 가장 예쁘고 맛있어 보이게 찍은 후에 사진을 계정에 업로드했다.

1000660569.english: - We added the words "hope" and "happiness" to the picture.

1000660570.english: - Once the upload was finished, it was time to eat.

1000660571.english: - To be exact... it was time to be fed.

1000660573.english: Hehehe, delicious, right? Tastes even better because I'm the one feeding you, right?
1000660573.korean: 히히히, 맛있죠? 제가 먹여드리니 더 맛있죠?

1000660574.english: Eheheh! Commander, you're blushing! How cute.

1000660575.english: See? Feeding each other is the true essence of a date.
1000660575.korean: 역시 서로 먹여주는 것은 데이트의 정석이라니까요.

1000660576.english: - Since I was embarrassed, I decided to get revenge on the smug Orangeade.

1000660577.english: Hm? Commander, you'll feed me too?

1000660580.english: - Orangeade blushed and ate the waffle I offered her.
1000660580.korean: - 오렌지에이드는 얼굴을 붉히고 내가 내민 와플을 받아먹었다.

1000660581.english: I-it's way more embarrassing than I thought...

1000660584.english: - Next, we went to a manga café.

1000660585.english: - I read the original manga of the movie we'd seen earlier.
1000660585.korean: - 나는 아까 전에 본 영화의 원작 만화를 읽었다.

1000660588.english: - I finally realized that Orangeade's complaints about the movie had been sharp, rational, and the height of insight.
1000660588.korean: - 오렌지에이드가 영화를 보고 늘어놓은 불평은 지적이고 이성적이고 자애의 극치인 발언이었음을 이제야 깨달았다.

1000660590.english: - With united resolve, we rushed off to erase humanity's dark history.
1000660590.korean: - 우리는 의기투합해서 인류의 흑역사를 지우러 달려갔다.

1000660592.english: No matter what, erasing past information for personal reasons isn't right, Master.
1000660592.korean: 아무리 그래도 사적인 이유로 구시대의 정보를 지우는 것은 바람직하지 않아요, 주인님.

1000660593.english: - Alpha caught us and scolded us.

1000660595.english: - Then we went to a clothing store.

1000660597.english: - There's no way they'd open a clothing shop just for me.
1000660597.korean: - 나 하나만을 위해서 옷가게를 열 리가 없지.

1000660598.english: - And besides, all my clothes are made by Audrey anyway.
1000660598.korean: - 그리고 어차피 내 옷은 오드리가 전부 만들어주고.

1000660599.english: Ehehe, I almost used up all my tuna cans just for today's date...
1000660599.korean: 에헤헤, 저도 오늘 데이트 때문에 참치캔을 거의 다 써버려서...

1000660600.english: - Orangeade looked wistfully at the clothes, then suddenly turned to me with an expression that she had a great idea.
1000660600.korean: - 오렌지에이드는 아쉽다는 듯이 옷들을 바라보다가 무언가 좋은 생각이 났다는 표정으로 내 쪽으로 고개를 돌렸다.

1000660602.english: I think this outfit would really suit you.
1000660602.korean: 이 옷 사령관님께 잘 어울릴 거 같은데요?

1000660603.english: - Saying that, Orangeade held up a piece of clothing.
1000660603.korean: - 그렇게 말하면서 오렌지에이드는 옷 하나를 들어보였다.

1000660604.english: - It was a light, fluttery dress.

1000660606.english: - Orangeade's eyes looked more serious than ever.
1000660606.korean: - 오렌지에이드의 눈은 그 어느 때보다 진지해 보였다.

1000660607.english: - Before Orangeade and I could awaken to something new, I grabbed her hand and escaped from the shop.
1000660607.korean: - 나와 오렌지에이드가 새로운 것에 눈을 뜨기 전에 오렌지에이드의 손을 붙잡고 가게를 탈출했다.

1000660609.english: They say the sushi here is really delicious.

1000660610.english: Hehe, it's usually so popular that it's hard to get a seat, but today we were lucky.
1000660610.korean: 헤헤, 너무 인기 있어서 자리 잡기 힘들다고 했는데, 오늘은 운이 좋게 자리가 있네요.

1000660612.english: - Ever since I got indigestion from sushi not long ago, just the sight of it made my stomach churn.
1000660612.korean: - 얼마 전에 초밥을 먹고 체한 이후로 초밥을 보면 속이 울렁거렸다.

1000660613.english: - Forcing myself to eat it and throwing up would ruin the date.
1000660613.korean: - 억지로 먹고 토해서 데이트를 망칠 수는 없잖아.

1000660614.english: Uh... th-then, how about we look around the area together?
1000660614.korean: 아... 그, 그러면 같이 근처를 둘러볼까요?

1000660615.english: - Luckily, there was a pasta place not far away.
1000660615.korean: - 다행히 멀지 않은 곳에 파스타 가게가 있었다.

1000660616.english: - The food was decent, but Orangeade seemed a little down.

1000660618.english: - Orangeade said that while eating the pasta, and then...

1000660621.english: - Her white clothes were stained with Orangeade.

1000660622.english: Hing... my plan was perfect, but...

1000660623.english: - Leaving the pasta shop behind, we walked along the promenade.
1000660623.korean: - 파스타 가게를 뒤로 하고 우리는 산책로를 걸었다.

1000660625.english: - Partly because it was away from the bustling city center.
1000660625.korean: - 중심지에서 벗어난 곳에 조성되었다는 이유도 있었고.

1000660627.english: - But more than that, it was because Orangeade, who would normally fill the silence with her lively voice, kept her mouth shut.
1000660627.korean: - 원래라면 이 고요를 활기찬 음성으로 채울 오렌지에이드가 입을 다물고 있다는 이유도 있었다.

1000660631.english: - Orangeade stayed silent for a long while.

1000660632.english: - Just as I was about to call out to her again, she finally spoke.
1000660632.korean: - 내가 다시 오렌지에이드를 부르려 할 때 오렌지에이드가 입을 열었다.

1000660633.english: Today... I prepared so hard for this date.

1000660634.english: To show Commander the prettiest version of myself, I got help from Borren and Audrey.
1000660634.korean: 사령관님과 데이트를 할 때의 최고로 예쁜 모습을 보여주기 위해서 보련 씨랑 오드리 씨에게 도움받고.

1000660635.english: I analyzed all the manga I've read so far, processed them into data, and created the ultimate date course, running countless simulations.
1000660635.korean: 지금까지 본 만화를 철저히 분석해서 정보로 가공하여 최고의 데이트 코스를 짠 후에 시뮬레이션도 수없이 돌렸어요.

1000660636.english: For Commander, I didn't want to just give the best. No-"the best" wasn't enough.

1000660637.english: I wanted you to experience the perfect date.

1000660639.english: I scrambled to prepare until dawn and overslept, ended up late. The movie I picked was a disaster.
1000660639.korean: 데이트 당일 새벽까지 허둥지둥 준비하느라고 늦잠자고, 약속 시간에 늦고. 기껏 고른 영화도 망작.

1000660640.english: We didn't even properly see the shops I had planned, Alpha scolded us, and even the outfit I worked so hard on ended up a mess.
1000660640.korean: 미리 골라 둔 가게는 제대로 둘러보지도 못하고, 알파 님께 혼나고, 혼신의 힘을 다한 코디도 엉망.

1000660641.english: At the start, I was so smug, boasting that I'd handle everything... and now it's just embarrassing.
1000660641.korean: 처음에 의기양양, 기고만장해져서 저한테만 맡기라고 한 게 너무 부끄러워요.

1000660643.english: - With those words, Orangeade lowered her head.
1000660643.korean: - 그렇게 말하고 오렌지에이드는 고개를 푹 숙였다.

1000660646.english: - I pulled Orangeade into my arms.

1000660648.english: - The words that followed weren't a comforting lie, but the truth.

1000660649.english: - Another masterpiece had been added to the collection in my heart.
1000660649.korean: - 내 마음속의 명작 목록에 새 작품이 늘었다.

1000660650.english: - Aurora's waffle went without saying, and the pasta was delicious too.
1000660650.korean: - 아우로라의 와플은 두말할 것도 없었고, 파스타도 맛있었다.

1000660651.english: - The clothing store had been a bit risky, though.

1000660652.english: - But all of that was secondary.

1000660653.english: - The reason today's date was so enjoyable was simply because Orangeade was by my side.
1000660653.korean: - 내가 오늘 데이트가 즐거웠던 것은 오렌지에이드가 옆에 있었기 때문이다.

1000660656.english: So much that I got excited and rambled on without stop.

1000660657.english: Sometimes I don't even remember what I said.
1000660657.korean: 가끔은 제가 뭐라고 했는지 모를 정도로요.

1000660658.english: I was just so happy that nothing else came to mind.
1000660658.korean: 너무너무 행복해서 다른 것은 전혀 떠오르지 않았어요.

1000660659.english: After reading ten thousand romance manga, I always thought-someday, I want a romantic date, love, and relationship like the ones in those stories.
1000660659.korean: 1만 권의 연애 만화를 보면서 나도 이렇게 만화에 나오는 로맨틱한 데이트, 연애, 사랑을 하고 싶다고 생각했어요.

1000660660.english: But when the moment finally came... reality was nothing like my imagination.
1000660660.korean: 그런데 정작 그 순간이 오니... 현실은 상상과는 전혀 다르네요.

1000660662.english: Even better! It's the best! It's thrilling! Reality is the best! Ehehehe!
1000660662.korean: 훨씬 좋은 거 있죠! 최고야! 짜릿해! 현실이 최고야! 에헤헤헤!

1000660663.english: - Orangeade lifted her head to look up at me.

1000660664.english: - The makeup around her eyes had smudged slightly, but her gaze was filled with joy.
1000660664.korean: - 오렌지에이드 눈가의 화장이 살짝 지워져 있었지만, 그녀의 눈에는 기쁨으로 가득 차 있었다.

1000660665.english: Ah, I'd forgotten something important too.
1000660665.korean: 아이참, 저도 중요한 것을 잊고 있었네요.

1000660666.english: What matters in a date isn't how perfect it is-it's how much you enjoy it.
1000660666.korean: 데이트에서 중요한 것은 얼마나 완벽한 데이트를 하느냐가 아니라 얼마나 즐기느냐인데.

1000660667.english: I still have a long way to go. I need to study romance manga even harder.
1000660667.korean: 저의 수양이 부족하네요. 연애 만화를 더 열심히 봐야겠어요.

1000660669.english: - Revived, Orangeade looked ready to chatter endlessly again.
1000660669.korean: - 기운을 차린 오렌지에이드는 다시 한참을 떠들 것 같았다.

1000660670.english: - But not long after, she went quiet once more.
1000660670.korean: - 그러나 오렌지에이드는 얼마 가지 못해 다시 조용해졌다.

1000660672.english: Um... the date course I prepared is... almost over.
1000660672.korean: 저기... 제가 준비한 데, 데이트 코스가 거, 거의 다 끝났네요.

1000660673.english: Ah, well, there's still one thing left... but...

1000660674.english: - Orangeade's voice grew fainter and fainter.

1000660675.english: - I leaned in close to hear her better.
1000660675.korean: - 나는 자세히 듣기 위해 오렌지에이드에게 귀를 기울였다.

1000660676.english: You know... what the last part is...

1000660678.english: Until the very end... please take care of me, Commander.

1000660679.english: Hussar, do you want to go on this date instead of me?
1000660679.korean: 후사르, 이번 데이트 나 대신 안 갈래?

1000660681.english: Are you crazy? To give up a chance to go on a date with the Commander?
1000660681.korean: 와? 니 미칬나? 오ㅃ- 사령관님이랑 데이트할 수 있는 기회를 붙잡았는데 무슨 소리야?

1000660683.english: You were training for four hours since dawn, weren't you?

1000660685.english: I also need to service the exosuit...

1000660686.english: I'll help you. If we do it together, it'll be quick, right?

1000660688.english: What's wrong? Making flimsy excuses like that doesn't sound like you at all.
1000660688.korean: 무슨 문제 있어? 그렇게 이런저런 거짓 핑계 대는 건 너답지 않잖아.

1000660689.english: It's just... a bit much, you know.

1000660690.english: Me-rough, unfeminine me-going on a date with the Captain...
1000660690.korean: 난폭하고, 여성스럽지 못한 내가 대장이랑... 데이트라니.

1000660691.english: Haha. I'd just feel guilty. There are so many girls prettier and more ladylike than me.
1000660691.korean: 하하. 대장한테 많이 미안하잖아. 나보다 예쁘고, 여성스러운 애들이 많은데.

1000660692.english: I'm fine just being the Captain's loyal subordinate.

1000660700.english: You brat. Are you out of your mind? There are girls dying to go on a date with Big Brotherya, and you're just throwing away that chance? I'll smack your butt!
1000660700.korean: 이 가시나야. 니 약 뭇나? 오빠야랑 데이트 하고 싶은 아들이 천치삐까린떼 니는 그 기회를 주차뿐다고? 궁디를 마 주차뿔라!

1000660701.english: ...But... I feel bad for the Captain.

1000660702.english: You feel bad for Big Brotherya but not for the other girls? They got the chance they wanted, and you're backing out like a coward?
1000660702.korean: 오빠야한테는 미안하고 다른 아들한텐 안 미안나? 가들이 바라는 기회를 얻었는데 니는 겁재이처럼 빼는기가?

1000660703.english: And what do you take me for? Did you think if you said that to me, I'd just go "Oh my, thank you kindly~" and bow down like some pushover?
1000660703.korean: 그리고 니는 내를 뭐라 생각했노? 내가 니한테 그런 소리 들으면 어이쿠야 감사합니데이~ 하고 넙죽 주 물려는 가시나로 보였나?

1000660704.english: No, fine, let's put that aside! I also want to go on a date with Big Brotherya, that's true!
1000660704.korean: 아니, 그건 그렇다 치자! 내도 오빠야랑 데이트 하고 싶은 건 사실이니까!

1000660705.english: What makes me angry is that the girl who kept pushing me to get closer to the Commander is now backing out when it's her turn!
1000660705.korean: 내가 화나는 것은 내한테 사령관이랑 잘 되보라고 등 떠밀던 가시나가 지 차례가 되니까 슬슬 빼는 거다!

1000660706.english: Where's the you who said you'd smash through any problem? Or was that just bluffing all along?
1000660706.korean: 어떤 문제가 있어도 까부순다던 니는 어데갔노? 아니면 평소 모습은 허세였나?

1000660707.english: And to think I've been trusting my back to a girl like this!
1000660707.korean: 내는 지금까지 이런 가시나한테 내 등 맡기고 있었던 거가!

1000660711.english: If you really don't want to, then please say so. Neither I nor Husar Big Sis want to force you into something you dislike.
1000660711.korean: 정말로 싫으시면 싫다고 말씀하세요. 저도 후사르 언니도 스파토이아 언니가 싫어하는 것을 억지로 강요하고 싶은 마음은 없어요.

1000660712.english: But if you're just hesitating, then we want to help you.
1000660712.korean: 하지만 단지 주저하시는 거라면 저희는 도와드리고 싶어요.

1000660713.english: When you first got the chance to go on a date with the Commander, you were so happy.
1000660713.korean: 언니 처음에는 사령관님이랑 데이트하게 되었을 때 엄청 기뻐하셨잖아요.

1000660714.english: That's why Husar Big Sis and I were shocked when you said you wouldn't go on a date with him.
1000660714.korean: 그래서 저랑 후사르 언니는 언니가 사령관님이랑 데이트 안 하겠다고 하셔서 놀란 거예요.

1000660715.english: What do you truly want to do, Big Sis?

1000660716.english: Please be honest. Whatever you choose, we'll support you.

1000660719.english: So you're doing it. Coco, hold her tight. I'm going to pretty this brat up.
1000660719.korean: 니 한다켔다. 코코, 단디 잡고 있어라. 내 이 가시나 꾸밀거리 가온다.

1000660720.english: - A date is always something to look forward to.

1000660721.english: - Not only because you can spend enjoyable time with your partner.
1000660721.korean: - 상대와 함께 즐거운 시간을 보낼 수 있기 때문이기도 했고.

1000660722.english: - But also because you can see a side of them you normally wouldn't.
1000660722.korean: - 상대의 평소와 다른 모습을 볼 수 있기도 하니까.

1000660723.english: - Especially with this date's partner, Spartoia, who never usually dresses up.
1000660723.korean: - 특히 이번 데이트 상대인 스파토이아는 평소 꾸미는 모습을 볼 수 없었다.

1000660724.english: - Before and after battle, it's always a suit; off-duty, coveralls or training wear.
1000660724.korean: - 전투 전후로는 슈트, 평소에는 정비복 혹은 트레이닝복.

1000660725.english: - Even her attitude is straightforward, placing more importance on hierarchy than on romance.
1000660725.korean: - 태도조차도 털털하고, 남녀관계보다는 상하관계를 더 중요시했다.

1000660726.english: - I was even more excited because I couldn't predict what kind of appearance she would show up with for the date.
1000660726.korean: - 그런 그녀가 어떤 모습으로 데이트에 나올지 예상이 되지 않았기에 더 기대됐다.

1000660727.english: - Filled with expectations and curiosity, I went to the meeting place.
1000660727.korean: - 기대와 궁금증을 가득 품고 약속장소에 가니.

1000660729.english: - Held by the hands of Coco and Hussar.

1000660730.english: - Rather than being impressed by Spartoia's appearance, I was more puzzled by the current situation.
1000660730.korean: - 스파토이아의 모습에 감탄하기 보다는 지금 상황에 대한 의아함이 더 컸다.

1000660731.english: - As I greeted and approached, the three came toward me.
1000660731.korean: - 내가 인사하며 다가가자 세 사람은 나에게 다가왔다.

1000660732.english: - To be precise, Coco and Hussar dragged her, and Spartoia was being dragged along.
1000660732.korean: - 정확하게 말하자면 코코와 후사르가 끌고 오고, 스파토이아가 끌려왔다.

1000660734.english: - Hussar handed Spartoia's hand to me and said.
1000660734.korean: - 후사르는 나에게 스파토이아의 손을 쥐여주며 말했다.

1000660735.english: Commander. No matter what happens, don't ever let go of Spartoia's hand.
1000660735.korean: 사령관님. 무슨 일이 있어도 스파토이아 손 절대로 놓지 마세요.

1000660737.english: You ran away because of the skirt. You ran away because the underwear was too revealing. You ran away because the blouse was see-through. When putting on makeup you ran away three times.
1000660737.korean: 치마 보고 도망가셨죠. 속옷이 야하다고 도망가셨죠, 블라우스 속이 비친다고 도망가셨죠. 화장할 때는 세 번이나 도망가셨죠.

1000660738.english: Even just now you kept looking for a chance to escape.
1000660738.korean: 방금까지도 도망가려고 계속 기회 엿보고 계셨잖아요.

1000660740.english: - I roughly understood what was going on.

1000660742.english: - Spartoia's hand was cold and damp with sweat.

1000660743.english: Then please have a good time.

1000660744.english: Spartoia, don't forget what we told you.
1000660744.korean: 스파토이아 우리가 말해준 거 잊지 말고.

1000660745.english: Commander, please take good care of our Spartoia.

1000660746.english: - With the two seeing us off, the date began.
1000660746.korean: - 두 사람의 배웅을 받으며 데이트를 시작했다.

1000660747.english: - Spartoia gave an awkward smile and said.

1000660748.english: Coco and Hussar forced me into this… Is it… weird? Can I go change?
1000660748.korean: 코코랑 후사르가 억지로 입혔는데... 이... 이상하지? 옷 갈아입고 와도 돼?

1000660751.english: - The feeling of curling up in embarrassment was not only because I was holding tightly onto Spartoia's hand.
1000660751.korean: - 손발이 오그라지는 느낌이 드는 건 스파토이아의 손을 꽉 쥐고 잇기 때문만은 아닐 것이다.

1000660753.english: - I praised her hard, but the response was minimal.

1000660754.english: - However, since it didn't seem like she disliked it, I continued.
1000660754.korean: - 하지만 싫어하지는 않은 것 같았기에 계속 했다.

1000660755.english: - Just as I received joy and comfort from dating them.
1000660755.korean: - 내가 그녀들과 데이트를 하면서 기쁨과 위로를 받는 것처럼.

1000660756.english: - I also wished that they would receive joy and comfort from dating me.
1000660756.korean: - 그녀들도 나와 데이트를 하면서 기쁨과 위로를 받기를 바랐으니까.

1000660760.english: Are you getting revenge for when Spartoia Big Sis teased you as a bunny girl long ago?
1000660760.korean: 옛날에 바니걸로 스파토이아 언니가 놀린 일을 복수하시는 건가요?

1000660762.english: But when else would that tomboyish girl ever look like this?
1000660762.korean: 하지만 저 머스마 같은 가시나 이럴 때 아니면 언제 저래 보겠노?

1000660763.english: And... that girl likes Big Brotherya too, doesn't she.
1000660763.korean: 그리고... 저 가시나도 오빠야 좋아하고 있다 아이가.

1000660764.english: As comrades and friends, we should cheer her on.

1000660765.english: - Before going through the date course, I walked around a bit to ease Spartoia's tension.
1000660765.korean: - 데이트 코스를 돌기에 앞서 스파토이아의 긴장을 풀어주기 위해서 잠시 주위를 걸었다.

1000660766.english: - After moving her body somewhat, Spartoia also seemed to loosen up and began to speak little by little.
1000660766.korean: - 어느 정도 몸을 움직이자 스파토이아도 긴장이 풀렸는지 조금씩 입을 열었다.

1000660767.english: Ugh... wearing a fluttery thin outfit makes me feel naked...
1000660767.korean: 으으... 하늘하늘하고 얇은 옷을 입으니 벌거벗은 거 같아...

1000660768.english: But still... wouldn't it look prettier on the other girls...
1000660768.korean: 그렇지만... 다른 애들이 입으면 더 예쁠 거 아냐...

1000660769.english: I want to wear the suit I usually wore...

1000660770.english: - Seeing the weak side of Spartoia, who was always strong if not aggressive, was both worrying and refreshing.
1000660770.korean: - 강하다 못해 호전적인 스파토이아의 약한 모습을 보니 걱정되는 동시에 신선했다.

1000660771.english: - I could have waited so she could change into the comfortable clothes she wanted.
1000660771.korean: - 스파토이아가 바라는 데로 편한 옷을 갈아입을 수 있게 기다려 줄 수도 있었지만.

1000660772.english: - But I also hoped she would accept and enjoy her dressed-up self, so I didn't.
1000660772.korean: - 꾸민 자신의 모습을 받아들이고 즐길 수 있게도 되기를 바랐기에 그러지는 않았다.

1000660773.english: ......Anywhere the Captain wants to go is fine.
1000660773.korean: ......대장이 가고 싶은 곳이면 아무 곳이나 좋아.

1000660774.english: - I was glad the answer wasn't "home."

1000660776.english: - We came to the virtual reality zone.

1000660777.english: - It's an experience space where you can appreciate various landscapes and artworks through hologram drones, and even take pictures with camera drones.
1000660777.korean: - 홀로그램 드론을 이용하여 다양한 풍경과 예술작품을 감상할 수 있고, 촬영 드론으로 사진도 찍을 수 있는 체험공간이다.

1000660779.english: - That was said while appreciating masterpieces of the century one by one.
1000660779.korean: - 세기의 명화들을 하나씩 감상하면서 한 말이다.

1000660780.english: - Surely they were well drawn, but since they weren't the originals, most of the feeling was just "well done."
1000660780.korean: - 확실히 잘 그리긴 했는데 진품을 보고 있는 게 아니라서 그런지 잘 그렸구나하는 감정이 대부분이다.

1000660781.english: - This time, we admired vivid living nature through holograms.
1000660781.korean: - 이번엔 홀로그램으로 생생하게 살아있는 대자연을 감상했다.

1000660782.english: - Beyond sight, the speakers and synthetic scents recreated hearing and smell, making it very realistic.
1000660782.korean: - 시각 외에도 스피커와 합성 향으로 청각과 후각까지 재현해서 무척이나 실감 났다.

1000660783.english: Someday, won't we be able to go there?

1000660784.english: - It did feel amazing, but since Spartoia's reaction was weak, my own feelings were muted too.
1000660784.korean: - 굉장하다는 느낌이 들기는 하는데 스파토이아의 반응이 약하니 나도 감흥이 약했다.

1000660785.english: - Fine. Up until here was within expectations. But how about this?
1000660785.korean: - 좋아. 여기까지는 상정 내다. 하지만 이건 어떨까?

1000660787.english: - From the night sky we see from Earth, it began, then stars, planets, galaxies, and nebulae unfolded before us.
1000660787.korean: - 우리가 사는 지구에서 올려다본 밤하늘에서부터 시작해서, 항성과 행성, 은하, 성운이 우리 앞에 펼쳐졌다.

1000660788.english: - To me it was simply a beautiful sight, but for Spartoia, who loved space, it must have been a deep impression.
1000660788.korean: - 나는 그냥 예쁘다고 느껴지는 광경이지만 우주를 좋아하는 스파토이아에게는 감회가 새롭겠지.

1000660792.english: - The reaction I expected to hit well—the impression of space—ended with just that.
1000660792.korean: - 잘 먹힐거라 예상했던 우주에 대한 감상평은 그것으로 끝.

1000660793.english: - It seemed the first course was a failure.
1000660793.korean: - 아무래도 첫 번째 코스는 실패인 거 같다.

1000660795.english: - We came to the escape room café.

1000660796.english: At first we solved puzzles together, then split up to solve each one separately in the middle, before reuniting to solve the last puzzle.
1000660796.korean: 처음까지는 같이 문제를 해결하고, 중간에선 갈라져서 각자 문제를 해결 후에, 다시 합류하고 마지막까지 문제 해결.

1000660797.english: - Since it was an interactive activity, Spartoia became more active, if not quite as much as usual.
1000660797.korean: - 상호작용이 있는 활동을 하니 평소만큼은 아니더라도 스파토이아도 적극적으로 변했다.

1000660800.english: - We solved the early stage together and split up at a fork.
1000660800.korean: - 함께 초반 스테이지를 해결하고 갈림길에서 갈라졌다.

1000660801.english: - After solving a few puzzles alone and arriving at the meeting point.
1000660801.korean: - 혼자서 몇 개의 문제를 해결하고 합류 지점에 도착하니.

1000660803.english: Ah, that one? I just put a little strength into it and it broke.
1000660803.korean: 아. 그거? 그냥 조금 힘주니까 부러지던데?

1000660804.english: ......See? I'm rough and not feminine at all.

1000660805.english: Sorry, Captain... for being like this...

1000660806.english: - Spartoia, who seemed to have regained energy, suddenly became discouraged.
1000660806.korean: - 기운을 차린 거 같았던 스파토이아는 순식간에 의기소침해졌다.

1000660807.english: - In the end, we failed to escape within the time limit.
1000660807.korean: - 결국 제한 시간 내에 탈출하지 못했다.

1000660809.english: - We went to the game center for Spartoia, who likes competition.
1000660809.korean: - 승부를 좋아하는 스파토이아를 위해서 게임센터에 왔다.

1000660810.english: Sorry... I don't know how to play that.
1000660810.korean: 미안해... 나 저거 하는 방법 몰라.

1000660811.english: - But instead of enjoying it, we only looked around the arcade.
1000660811.korean: - 그러나 게임센터를 둘러보기만 했을 뿐 제대로 즐기지는 못했다.

1000660814.english: - This time, we boldly went to the training room.

1000660815.english: Captain... how am I supposed to work out in these clothes...
1000660815.korean: 대장... 이런 옷 입고 운동을 어떻게 해...

1000660816.english: - This time, her enthusiasm backfired, and it was another failure.

1000660819.english: - Spartoia still couldn't regain her energy.

1000660820.english: - While I was wondering where to go to cheer her up, Spartoia spoke.
1000660820.korean: - 어디를 가야 스파토이아가 기운을 차릴까 하고 고민할 때, 스파토이아가 말했다.

1000660821.english: Captain, shall we end the date soon?

1000660822.english: Yeah, I've enjoyed it enough too, and you look tired.
1000660822.korean: 응, 나도 충분히 즐겼고, 대장도 피곤해보여서.

1000660824.english: - Spartoia tried to let go of my hand.

1000660825.english: - But I didn't let go. Instead, I held it tighter.
1000660825.korean: - 그러나 나는 그 손을 놓지 않았다. 반대로 꽉 잡았다.

1000660826.english: - Spartoia's hand was still cold and damp.

1000660829.english: The only reason I'm on this date with you, Captain, is because I happened to win the draw.
1000660829.korean: 내가 대장이랑 데이트 하는 건 어디까지나 당첨되었기 때문이잖아.

1000660830.english: I... I'm rough and not feminine at all.

1000660831.english: The Orca has so many girls prettier and more feminine than me. Out of all of them, why me...
1000660831.korean: 오르카 호에는 나보다 예쁘고 여성스러운 애들이 가득한데. 그런 애들을 두고 하필 나라니...

1000660832.english: I feel so guilty toward you, Captain. And toward the others too.

1000660833.english: Haha, but for me, this alone is more than enough.

1000660834.english: - Spartoia smiled, but unlike usual, her smile lacked energy.
1000660834.korean: - 스파토이아는 웃었지만 그 웃음은 평소와 달리 기운이 없었다.

1000660835.english: - From her smile and words, I finally understood why Spartoia had seemed down all day.
1000660835.korean: - 스파토이아의 웃음과 말로 나는 스파토이아가 왜 지금까지 기운이 없었는지 이해했다.

1000660836.english: - So I wanted to clear up this misunderstanding.
1000660836.korean: - 그래서 나는 이 오해를 풀고 싶었다.

1000660837.english: - I acknowledged what Spartoia had said.

1000660838.english: - And then, I put into words the charms of Spartoia that I knew.
1000660838.korean: - 그리고 내가 알고 있는 스파토이아의 매력을 입에 담는다.

1000660839.english: - The things I had seen until now.

1000660840.english: - And even the new sides I had discovered today.
1000660840.korean: - 내가 오늘 새롭게 알게 된 모습까지.

1000660841.english: - I conveyed them with my feelings.

1000660842.english: - I spoke my heart and confirmed hers.
1000660842.korean: - 내 마음을 전하고, 그녀의 마음을 확인했다.

1000660843.english: - Hearing my words, Spartoia's lips trembled before she lowered her head.
1000660843.korean: - 내 말을 들은 스파토이아는 입술을 떨다가 고개를 숙였다.

1000660844.english: The person I love... not loving me back... confirming that... I was terrified of it.
1000660844.korean: 내가 좋아하는 사람이... 나를 좋아해주지 않는 것이... 그것을 확인하는 것이 두려웠어.

1000660845.english: So I kept comparing myself to others, kept putting myself down.
1000660845.korean: 그러니까 저절로 다른 사람이랑 비교하게 되고, 저절로 비하하게 됐어.

1000660846.english: That's why, like a coward, I tried to avoid learning how you truly felt and just ran away.
1000660846.korean: 그래서 겁쟁이처럼 대장의 마음을 알려고 하지 않고 도망치려고 했어.

1000660847.english: But even so... you said you like me.

1000660849.english: My attitude and actions... were ignoring the feelings of the Captain who loves me.
1000660849.korean: 내 태도와 행동이... 나를 좋아해주는 대장의 마음을 무시하는 거였어.

1000660851.english: - On her face was the expression I was used to seeing.
1000660851.korean: - 그곳에는 내가 평소에 보던 그 표정이 있었다.

1000660853.english: I won't look away like a coward anymore.

1000660854.english: The Captain said you like me, so what is there to be afraid of?
1000660854.korean: 대장이 나를 좋아한다고 했는데 두려워할 게 뭐가 있겠어.

1000660855.english: Just like I'm proud of being Spartoia—no, even more than that—I'll be proud that the Captain loves me!
1000660855.korean: 내가 스파토이아라는 걸 자랑스러워하는 것처럼, 아니, 그 이상으로 대장이 나를 좋아해 주는 것을 자랑스러워할게!

1000660856.english: Battle, space, and... love. Whatever it is, leave it to me!
1000660856.korean: 전투면 전투, 우주면 우주 그리고... 사랑이면 사랑. 어느 것이든 맡겨줘!

1000660857.english: - Spartoia said that and pulled me along.

1000660858.english: Then let's keep the date going. Earlier at the café, I couldn't order dessert because I was too worried about people staring. Let's go eat that first.
1000660858.korean: 그러면 데이트 계속하자. 아까 카페에서 주위 사람 눈 신경 쓴다고 주문 못한 디저트가 있는데 그것부터 먹자.

1000660860.english: - The hand pulling me along had already turned warm.
1000660860.korean: - 나를 잡아끄는 그녀의 손은 어느새 따뜻하게 변해 있었다.

1000660861.english: - The time with the revitalized Spartoia was incomparably more enjoyable than before.
1000660861.korean: - 기운을 차린 스파토이아와의 시간은 그 전과는 비교도 안 되게 즐거웠다.

1000660862.english: - As if to make up for her hesitation at the arcade earlier, Spartoia threw herself into the games.
1000660862.korean: - 게임센터에서 쭈뼛거린 것을 설욕하려는 것처럼 스파토이아는 열심히 게임을 즐겼다.

1000660863.english: Captain! I'm coming to attack now!

1000660864.english: Haha! Well then, we just have to smash everything, right?
1000660864.korean: 하하! 그러면 다 때려잡으면 그만 아니야?

1000660866.english: - When she won, she was thrilled.

1000660867.english: Ah... too bad. If I'd been just a little faster, I would've won.
1000660867.korean: 아... 아깝다. 조금만 더 빨랐으면 이겼는데.

1000660869.english: - When she lost, she got frustrated and challenged again.

1000660872.english: Yeah! I'm happy too, because I'm with you, Captain!

1000660873.english: But I'm still not going to go easy on you.

1000660875.english: - We returned to the escape room café.

1000660876.english: I have to get my revenge.

1000660877.english: Losing and running away—I'll never allow it.
1000660877.korean: 지고 도망치는 건 내가 절대로 용납 못 해.

1000660878.english: But please don't break the locks this time.

1000660880.english: - After apologizing and listening to the rules, we entered the room.
1000660880.korean: - 사과하고 설명을 들은 후 우리는 방으로 들어갔다.

1000660881.english: Alright! Let's look for clues, Captain!

1000660882.english: - Working together with Spartoia, we searched for clues to escape.
1000660882.korean: - 스파토이아와 힘을 합쳐 방을 탈출하기 위한 단서들을 찾아갔다.

1000660883.english: Captain, if we shine light here, I think the safe will open. You go find a flashlight over there.
1000660883.korean: 대장, 여기에 빛을 쪼이면 금고가 열리는 거 같아. 대장은 저쪽에서 라이트를 찾아줘.

1000660884.english: - After searching the room for a bit...

1000660885.english: - I found a flashlight inside a locked drawer.

1000660886.english: - Holding it, I turned to look at Spartoia.

1000660888.english: - Spartoia was kneeling on the floor, leaning forward, peeking under the bed.
1000660888.korean: - 스파토이아는 바닥에 무릎을 꿇은 채 엎드려 침대 밑을 뒤지고 있었다.

1000660889.english: - Maybe because of her different outfit, Spartoia didn't realize what she looked like just then.
1000660889.korean: - 평소랑 다른 옷을 입고 있어서 그런가 스파토이아는 자신이 지금 어떤 모습인지 모르나보다.

1000660890.english: - Wearing a short skirt in that position...
1000660890.korean: - 짧은 치마를 입고 저런 자세를 하면...

1000660892.english: - Feeling a strange urge, I reached out and stroked Spartoia.

1000660894.english: - Spartoia trembled when my hand touched her, but she didn't pull away.
1000660894.korean: - 스파토이아는 내 손이 닿자 몸을 떨었으나 피하지는 않았다.

1000660895.english: - I lifted her up and gently laid her on the bed.
1000660895.korean: - 나는 스파토이아를 안아들고 조심스럽게 침대에 눕혔다.

1000660897.english: W-Weren't we in the middle of an escape room?
1000660897.korean: 우, 우리 지금 방탈출하는 중 아니었어?

1000660898.english: Do we... not need to escape?

1000660899.english: Captain, you seem different today. Like... you've lost your composure.
1000660899.korean: 대장, 오늘은 좀 다르네. 뭔가... 여유가 없어진 것 같아.

1000660900.english: As if... I could ever dislike this.

1000660901.english: - Spartoia closed her eyes and took a deep breath.

1000660904.english: - Spartoia laughed cutely and wrapped her arms around my neck.
1000660904.korean: - 스파토이아는 귀엽게 웃고는 내 목에 팔을 둘렀다.

1000660905.english: - I knew what she wanted, so I gave her what she wished for.
1000660905.korean: - 그녀가 바라는 것이 무엇인지 알았기에 그녀가 원하는 대로 했다.

1000660909.english: U-um. Excuse me. Sorry to interrupt your good time, but!
1000660909.korean: 저, 저. 저기. 좋은 시간 방해해서 죄송한데요!

1000660910.english: P-please don't engage in indecent acts inside the room!
1000660910.korean: 바, 방에서 음란 행위는 하지 말아 주세요!

1000660915.english: - The fun time passed by quickly, and before I knew it, it was already time for dinner.
1000660915.korean: - 즐거운 시간은 무척이나 빠르게 흘러 어느새 저녁을 먹을 시간이 되었다.

1000660919.english: Up until now, the Captain's been leading me around, right?

1000660920.english: For the finale, I'll return the favor.

1000660922.english: Wouldn't it be boring if I told you in advance?

1000660924.english: - Carrying a picnic basket and mat, we headed outside.

1000660925.english: But by the time we arrived at our destination, it was already dark.
1000660925.korean: 그러나 목적지에 도착할 즘엔 이미 주위가 어두웠다.

1000660928.english: - Following Spartoia's words, I raised my head and saw a sky packed with stars.
1000660928.korean: - 스파토이아의 말을 따라 고개를 드니 별들이 촘촘하게 박힌 하늘이 보였다.

1000660929.english: Yeah. There's no way this grandeur could be recreated in a confined space.
1000660929.korean: 응. 이 박력을 좁은 공간에서 어떻게 나타낼 수 있겠어.

1000660930.english: - Gazing at the stars, Spartoia began to talk about space.
1000660930.korean: - 스파토이아는 별을 올려다보면서 우주에 대한 이야기를 시작했다.

1000660931.english: Strictly speaking, a meteor shower isn't meteors falling onto Earth—it happens when Earth, during its orbit, passes through a trail of comet fragments.
1000660931.korean: 유성우라는 것은 엄밀하게 말하자면 유성이 지구로 쏟아지는 게 아니라 지구가 공전을 하면서 혜성의 파편지대를 지날 때 생기는 거야.

1000660933.english: In this poem, the speaker describes the astronomer as someone unemotional, opposite to themselves.
1000660933.korean: 이 시에서 화자는 천문학자를 자신과 대조되는, 감성적이지 못한 자라고 표현해.

1000660934.english: But really, who could be more serious and emotional about stars than an astronomer?
1000660934.korean: 하지만 천문학자만큼 별에 대해서 진지하고 감성적인 자들이 또 누가 있겠어?

1000660935.english: - There were stories about poems themed around stars.
1000660935.korean: - 별을 주제로 한 시에 대한 이야기도 있었고.

1000660936.english: Captain, want to connect the stars I'm pointing at? That one and that one.
1000660936.korean: 대장, 내가 가리키는 별들을 한번 이어볼래? 저거랑 저거.

1000660937.english: Yeah, so what do you see? Hehe, I thought it looked like you, Captain.
1000660937.korean: 응, 그러면 뭐가 보여? 헤헷, 나는 대장으로 보이던데.

1000660938.english: It's a constellation I created—one of a kind in the universe. I'll gift it to you!
1000660938.korean: 우주에 단 하나밖에 없는, 내가 만든 별자리야. 대장한테 선물할게!

1000660939.english: - There were also stories about constellations.

1000660940.english: - The stories Spartoia shared were fascinating, and the way she spoke with joy and sparkle made my heart flutter too.
1000660940.korean: - 스파토이아가 해주는 이야기는 재미있었고, 즐겁게 이야기하는 그녀의 모습과 목소리에 내 마음도 들떴다.

1000660941.english: - Listening to her stories of space, I gradually began to see the night sky through Spartoia's eyes.
1000660941.korean: - 스파토이아가 말하는 우주 이야기를 들으면서 나는 점점 더 스파토이아와 같은 눈으로 밤하늘을 볼 수 있게 되었다.

1000660942.english: - As the night deepened and our hearts grew closer, Spartoia said:
1000660942.korean: - 밤이 깊고 마음도 깊어질 즘 스파토이아가 말했다.

1000660944.english: I love its overwhelming presence beyond human comprehension, and its mystery.
1000660944.korean: 사람의 인지를 넘어선 압도적인 존재감과 그 신비함이 좋아.

1000660945.english: I love the precise and intricate equations drawn from physics and aerospace science.
1000660945.korean: 물리학과 항공우주학으로 자아내는 정밀하고 복잡한 수식도 좋아.

1000660946.english: I love that it's beautiful just to look at, and that people wove stories about it with imagination.
1000660946.korean: 그냥 봐도 예쁘고, 사람들이 상상력으로 만들어낸 이야기도 좋아.

1000660947.english: I love how the unexplored parts awaken my curiosity and sense of adventure.
1000660947.korean: 아직 밝혀지지 않은 부분들은 나의 탐구심과 모험심을 자극해서 좋아.

1000660948.english: To say I love space isn't an exaggeration.

1000660951.english: Usually, people describe the universe as Infinite.

1000660952.english: But in reality, it's unimaginably vast and expanding faster than the speed of light.
1000660952.korean: 하지만 실제로는 어마어마하게 크고 광속이상으로 팽창하는 거야.

1000660953.english: Still, there actually is something Infinite in this world. Do you know what that is?
1000660953.korean: 그렇지만 세상에는 실제로 무한한 게 있어. 그게 뭘 거 같아?

1000660954.english: - Before I could answer, Spartoia lightly ran forward and created some distance.
1000660954.korean: - 내가 답을 내기도 전에 스파토이아는 가볍게 뛰어 나와 거리를 벌렸다.

1000660955.english: - At less than 10 meters away, Spartoia stopped, turned her body, and looked at me.
1000660955.korean: - 10m도 안 되는 거리에서 스파토이아는 멈추고 몸을 돌려 나를 바라보았다.

1000660957.english: - With the endlessly sprawling night sky at her back, Spartoia shouted toward me.
1000660957.korean: - 스파토이아는 끝없이 펼쳐진 밤하늘을 등에 지고 나를 향해 외쳤다.

1000660958.english: I, Spartoia, love the Captain more than the universe!

1000660959.english: - Her powerful confession, filling my heart, surely filled the universe and reached beyond it.
1000660959.korean: - 내 마음을 가득 채운 그녀의 힘찬 고백은 분명 우주를 가득 채우고 그 너머까지 닿았으리라.

1000660960.english: Ah, today was fulfilling as well.

1000660963.english: Haha, same here. The inside of my suit is completely drenched with sweat right now.
1000660963.korean: 하하, 나도 마찬가지야. 지금 슈트 안쪽이 땀으로 엄청 축축해.

1000660964.english: I need to wash up quickly and put on a face pack.

1000660965.english: Hussar, can I borrow a pack too?
1000660965.korean: 후사르, 나도 팩 빌려줄 수 있어?

1000660966.english: Huh? Up until now you never used things like that—you said it was too much trouble.
1000660966.korean: 응? 지금까지는 팩 같은 거 안 썼잖아. 귀찮다고.

1000660967.english: From now on, I'm going to take care of my skin.

1000660968.english: Hehehe. I see, after going on a date with the Commander last time, you've awakened to dressing up, huh?
1000660968.korean: 후후후. 알겠다. 지난 번에 사령관님이랑 데이트하고 너도 멋 부리는 것에 눈을 떴구나?

1000660970.english: ......It's kind of boring when you just accept it. It's more fun when you get embarrassed.
1000660970.korean: ......그냥 수긍하니까 영 재미가 없네. 뭔가 쑥스러워해야 재밌는데,

1000660971.english: I'm not used to it yet. But if it's something the Captain would like, I want to do my best. The Captain told me he liked it when I always did my best, no matter what it was.
1000660971.korean: 아직 익숙하지는 않아. 하지만 대장이 좋아할 만한 거면 최선을 다하려고. 대장이 어느 것이든 최선을 다하는 내 모습을 좋아한다고 해줬거든.

1000660972.english: Yeah, yeah. That's just like the person who confessed with all her might to the Commander in the middle of the night and woke everyone up.
1000660972.korean: 그래, 그래. 오밤중에 있는 힘껏 사령관한테 고백해서 자던 사람들 다 깨운 사람답다.

1000660973.english: Yet when I wore a bunny girl outfit, you teased me so much.
1000660973.korean: 내가 바니걸 입었을 때는 그렇게 놀려대더니.

1000660975.english: Well, whatever. That's already in the past.

1000660977.english: I'll just get a quick temporary adjustment from Fortune and then head in.
1000660977.korean: 저는 포츈 언니한테 화이트셸 임시 정비만 받고 갈게요.

1000660978.english: Okay. I'll go wash up first.

1000660980.english: What kind of underwear is this, girl?
1000660980.korean: 이 가시나 이거 속옷이 와 이라노?

1000660982.english: You should save underwear like this for important days—why wear it on a normal day?
1000660982.korean: 이런 남사시러븐 속옷은 중요한 날에 입어야지 와 평소에 입노?

1000660984.english: Can't you tell by looking? The material's so delicate it'll get torn to shreds. You were planning on exercising in this, weren't you?
1000660984.korean: 보면 모르나. 재질이 약해서 다 찢어진다 아이가. 니 이거 입고 운동할라 캤제?

1000660985.english: That's like throwing a can of tuna in the gutter!

1000660986.english: Let me see your cosmetics too.

1000660987.english: Why are you only using supplies? These are all expired!
1000660987.korean: 보급품만 쓰면 우야노! 이건 유통기한도 다 지났다 아이가!

1000660989.english: Wow, girl, you've got a long way to go. Forget exercising today, let's go buy some proper cosmetics and underwear together.
1000660989.korean: 와, 이 가시나 아직 멀었네. 오늘은 운동 빼고 내랑 같이 화장품이랑 속옷 사러 가자.

1000660994.english: I'm sorry, I'm sorry! I didn't know, I'm sorry!

1000660995.english: - As soon as she woke up, Habetrot was apologizing.

1000660996.english: Even if I've just been commissioned, an officer is still an officer. For me to make a mistake like this...
1000660996.korean: 아무리 갓 임관했다고 해도 장교는 장교. 그런 제가 이런 실수를 범하다니...

1000660997.english: Unfit as an officer—no, I'm a stain on Stilline! I'm sorry!
1000660997.korean: 간부 실격, 아니! 스틸라인의 오점이에요! 죄송합니다!

1000660998.english: - For a moment, several scenarios flashed through my mind.
1000660998.korean: - 순간, 머릿 속에 몇 가지 상황이 스쳐 지나갔다.

1000661000.english: I never did! Absolutely, I never did that!

1000661001.english: No matter how newly commissioned a second lieutenant may be, they know basic manners.
1000661001.korean: 아무리 갓 임관한 소위여도 기본적인 예의는 알고 있어요.

1000661003.english: There's no problem with supplies, since Sergeant Gnome and Corporal Silky are helping me.
1000661003.korean: 물자 관련은 노움 병장님과 실키 상병님이 도와주고 계셔서 문제 없어요.

1000661004.english: I should take over as soon as possible… I feel sorry to both of them.
1000661004.korean: 하루 빨리 인수인계 받아야 하는데... 두 분한테 죄송하네요.

1000661006.english: Aaaaah! No, Private Brownie, you didn't do anything wrong either!
1000661006.korean: 아아아아! 아니에요, 브라우니 일병님도 아무 잘못 안 했어요!

1000661009.english: It was just a small mishap… It's fine.

1000661010.english: It was only my clothes that got ruined anyway… and your intentions were good.
1000661010.korean: 어차피 제 옷만 망가졌으니까... 그리고 선의였으니까요.

1000661011.english: I was moved once again by that pure heart that cares for others. To be commissioned as a second lieutenant in such a great unit like Steel Line is truly an honor…
1000661011.korean: 남을 위하는 순수한 마음에 다시 한번 감동했어요. 스틸라인처럼 위대한 부대의 소위로 임관돼서 정말 영광...

1000661012.english: For someone like me to make a mistake…!

1000661014.english: - If it's not this either, then I can't guess.
1000661014.korean: - 이것도 아니면 짐작 가는 게 없는데.

1000661016.english: Recently, it's been three years since Your Excellency took command of the Orca, and we had a party…
1000661016.korean: 이번에 각하께서 오르카 호를 이끄신지 3주년이 되어 파티를 가졌었잖아요...

1000661017.english: - A gathering where everyone came together around a big cake.
1000661017.korean: - 커다란 케이크를 중심으로 모두가 한데 모였었던 자리.

1000661018.english: - Everyone who's been with me since I opened my eyes and those who joined along the way. Every single one. They prepared a birthday party for me.
1000661018.korean: - 내가 눈을 떴을 때부터 함께해 온 이들과 도중에 합류한 이들 모두 단 한 사람. 나를 위해 생일 파티를 준비해줬었지.

1000661019.english: At that time, not only Captain Marie but all the Steel Line members congratulated the Commander…
1000661019.korean: 그때 마리 대장님은 물론, 다른 스틸라인 분들도 모두 사령관님을 축하해드렸는데...

1000661021.english: - Recently joined Habertrot was unable to attend that occasion.
1000661021.korean: - 최근에 합류한 하베트롯은 그 자리에 참석하지 못했다.

1000661022.english: - It couldn't be helped, but she must have felt responsible.
1000661022.korean: - 어쩔 수 없던 건데, 책임감을 느끼고 있을 줄은.

1000661025.english: No, it's not because I couldn't attend that.
1000661025.korean: 아니에요, 그 자리에 참석 못해서가 아니에요.

1000661026.english: Of course, that too, but the reason I said I'm disqualified as a second lieutenant is…!
1000661026.korean: 물론 그것도 있지만, 제가 소위 실격이라고 말씀드린 이유는...!

1000661027.english: That not even once did I say congratulations to the Commander, nor did I prepare something to make you happy…
1000661027.korean: 제가 단 한 번도 사령관님에게 축하의 말을 건네거나, 따로 기뻐하실 걸 준비하지 않았단 점이에요...

1000661028.english: - Well, considering you joined not long ago, I think that's understandable.
1000661028.korean: - 그야 합류한지 얼마 안 돼서 충분히 그럴 수 있다 생각하는데.

1000661029.english: I've heard of the things you've done, Commander!

1000661030.english: Not only did you rescue Captain Marie in danger, but you also devised the meticulous plan that allowed Steel Line to have its current strength!
1000661030.korean: 위기에 빠진 마리 대장님을 구출하신 데다, 스틸라인이 지금의 전력을 갖출 수 있게 치밀한 계획을 세우셨죠!

1000661031.english: You fought Iron Parasites the moment you opened your eyes, defeated the Star Child, and even carried out a massive refugee rescue operation against PECS's Lemonades!
1000661031.korean: 눈을 뜨자마자 철충과 전투하고, 별의 아이를 쓰러뜨린 건 물론! PECS의 레모네이드들을 상대로 대규모 난민 구출 작전까지!

1000661032.english: On top of that, you've been working day and night to ensure everyone's convenience on the Orca… while I haven't been able to do anything for you…
1000661032.korean: 게다가 오르카 호에 계신 모두의 편의를 봐주기 위해 밤낮으로 일하고 계신데... 저만 아무것도 못 해드렸으니...

1000661034.english: - Everything Habertrot mentioned was impossible for me alone. They were only possible because of everyone's help.
1000661034.korean: - 하베트롯이 말한 일들은 전부 나 혼자서는 불가능했다. 모두의 도움이 있었기에 가능한 일이었다.

1000661035.english: - I appreciate the praise, but it feels a little like I've been deified…
1000661035.korean: - 높이 평가해주는 건 고맙긴 한데 조금 신격화된 듯한...

1000661036.english: Just wait a few more days, Your Excellency Commander!

1000661037.english: Without fail! Without fail, Second Lieutenant Habertrot of Steel Line will prepare something that will make Your Excellency happy!
1000661037.korean: 반드시! 반드시 스틸라인 부대, 하베트롯 소위가 각하께서 기뻐할 걸 준비해 오겠습니다!

1000661038.english: Then I'll come to see you again next time!

1000661039.english: - I stared blankly at the spot Habertrot had left, then sat down on the bed.
1000661039.korean: - 하베트롯이 떠난 자리를 물끄러미 바라보다 침대에 걸터 앉았다.

1000661040.english: - I've heard about her story. They say she's busy even at night, learning the duties and studying manuals.
1000661040.korean: - 하베트롯의 이야기는 전해 듣고 있다. 야간에도 업무 파악과 교범 공부로 바쁘다던데.

1000661041.english: - It reminded me of my past experience, when eagerness alone led to failure in supply improvement.
1000661041.korean: - 과거에 의욕만 앞서 급양 개선에 실패했던 내 경험이 떠올랐다.

1000661042.english: - Well, since I'm up, maybe I should change clothes first.

1000661044.english: I forgot to salute on my way out, auuugh… I'm sorry!
1000661044.korean: 나갈 때 경례 드리는 걸 깜빡해서, 아으으... 죄송합니다!

1000661046.english: - My naked self and Habertrot's eyes met.

1000661049.english: - Habertrot, her face flushed red, hurriedly rushed out of the captain's cabin.
1000661049.korean: - 얼굴을 빨갛게 물들인 하베트롯이 황급히 함장실을 빠져 나갔다.

1000661050.english: - She hasn't been here long yet… everything's clumsy for her, so it's understandable…
1000661050.korean: - 아직 온지 얼마 안 됐으니까... 모든 게 서투를 때니까, 이해는 가는데...

1000661051.english: - The cold wind that came in through the open door struck my body.
1000661051.korean: - 열린 방문 사이로 들어온 찬바람이 내 몸을 때렸다.

1000661055.english: Yes?! What's the matter, is it an emergency?!

1000661056.english: Just a moment! Let me check my equipment again…

1000661058.english: Are you alright, Second Lieutenant Habertrot?

1000661059.english: If you're not feeling well, it's fine to go in and rest first.
1000661059.korean: 몸이 안 좋으면 먼저 들어가서 쉬셔도 괜찮아요.

1000661060.english: Lately, you've been dozing off while standing more often.
1000661060.korean: 요즘 선 채로 조는 일이 잦아지셨어요.

1000661061.english: Like before, I can take charge of the supplies. You don't have to overdo it.
1000661061.korean: 이전처럼 군수 물자는 제가 담당해도 괜찮아요. 무리하지 않으셔도 돼요.

1000661063.english: Since there wasn't a designated person, you two were handling it, right? I need to take over quickly.
1000661063.korean: 담당자가 없어서 두 분이 맡고 계셨었잖아요? 제가 빨리 인수인계 받아야죠.

1000661066.english: They say she even keeps the lights on until dawn these days. She's clearly overworking herself.
1000661066.korean: 요새는 새벽까지도 연등하신다고 하네요. 무리하고 계신 게 분명해요.

1000661067.english: I'm worried something serious might happen at this rate.

1000661069.english: ...We should. We can't just watch while family collapses.
1000661069.korean: ...그래야죠. 가족이 쓰러지는 건 두고 볼 수 없으니까요.

1000661070.english: I'll put it in the panel report.

1000661072.english: Phew! Now I get it. So this is how you do it.
1000661072.korean: 휴! 이제 이해되네요. 이렇게 하는 거군요.

1000661073.english: Underline the important parts… Ah! I should also review what I organized yesterday.
1000661073.korean: 중요한 부분에 밑줄을 치고... 아! 어제 정리한 것들도 복습해야죠.

1000661074.english: And read the training manual and combat log, and prepare something that His Excellency will be happy with…
1000661074.korean: 그리고 훈련 교본과 전투 일지도 읽고, 각하께서 기뻐하실 만한 것도...

1000661077.english: I don't know what gift would make His Excellency happy!

1000661078.english: It doesn't have to be greater than the 3rd anniversary festival, but there must be something he'd like!
1000661078.korean: 3주년 축제보다 대단한 건 아니어도, 분명 기뻐하실 게 있을 텐데!

1000661079.english: If it were Captain Marie or Commander Red Hood… no, if it were the others, what gift would they prepare…?
1000661079.korean: 마리 대장님과 레드후드 연대장님이라면... 아니, 다른 분들이었다면 어떤 걸 선물해 드렸을까요...

1000661081.english: For now, I'll write down everything that comes to mind and eliminate them one by one. But if nothing's left…
1000661081.korean: 일단 생각나는 건 전부 적어보고 하나씩 소거법으로 정리해야겠어요. 그래도 아무것도 안 나오면...

1000661083.english: They're just big… and underwear that fits is hard to find, it's only been uncomfortable…
1000661083.korean: 크기만 하고... 사이즈에 맞는 속옷도 잘 없어서 불편하기만 했었는데...

1000661084.english: If it's this… would he like it…?

1000661086.english: No way! How could I even think of such a thing with His Excellency the Commander…!
1000661086.korean: 무리예요! 어떻게 내가 사령관 각하랑 그렇고 저런...!

1000661087.english: I need to organize ideas first!

1000661088.english: Hmm… since I'll filter them by elimination anyway…

1000661089.english: I'll just write it down too as a gift…

1000661091.english: A-all written down… Now, if I cross them out one by one from this list…!
1000661091.korean: 다, 다 적었다... 이제 이 목록에서 하나씩 소거해 나가면!

1000661093.english: Ha! I almost fell asleep again. I still have things left to do…
1000661093.korean: 핫! 또 잠들 뻔했어. 아직 할 게 남았는데...

1000661094.english: If I sleep… hmm… I can't…

1000661097.english: - Since the light was on, I came in and found Habertrot sleeping.
1000661097.korean: - 불이 켜져 있어서 들어와봤더니 하베트롯이 자고 있었다.

1000661098.english: - A few days ago, I asked Gnome and Silky to tell me if Habertrot looked like she needed help.
1000661098.korean: - 며칠 전에 노움과 실키한테 하베트롯에게 도움이 필요해 보이면 내게 알려달라고 부탁했다.

1000661099.english: - Work had piled up, so I planned to visit her tomorrow morning, but I came just in case…
1000661099.korean: - 업무 처리가 늦어져서 내일 아침에 찾아가려 했는데, 혹시나 했서 와봤더니...

1000661100.english: - I glanced at the paper on the desk. Cooking contest, Valentine's, idol. Countless other gift ideas were listed, with thick strike-through lines across them.
1000661100.korean: - 책상 위에 놓인 종이를 힐끗 봤다. 요리대회, 발렌타인, 아이돌. 그 외에 수많은 선물 목록에 취소선이 좍좍 그어져있다.
