1000661101.english: - The thought is admirable, but thinking that she's suffering because of me makes me more worried.
1000661101.korean: - 마음은 기특하지만, 나 때문에 고생한다 생각하니 걱정이 앞선다.

1000661102.english: - Instead of waking the deeply sleeping Habertrot, I draped my coat over her.
1000661102.korean: - 깊이 잠든 하베트롯을 깨우는 대신, 내가 입은 외투를 덮어줬다.

1000661103.english: - I was about to leave a note telling her not to overdo it, when one gift in particular stood out.
1000661103.korean: - 무리하지 말라고 메모라도 남기려는데, 유난히 눈에 띄는 선물이 하나.

1000661104.english: - I gave a small laugh upon seeing it, then circled it with a pen.
1000661104.korean: - 그걸 보고 작게 웃은 뒤 볼펜으로 동그라미를 쳤다.

1000661105.english: - Quietly turned off the light and left so as not to wake her.
1000661105.korean: - 깨지 않게 조용히 불을 끄고 나갔다.

1000661106.english: V-victory! Good morning, Your Excellency Commander!
1000661106.korean: 스, 승리! 안녕히 주무셨습니까, 사령관 각하!

1000661107.english: Ah, yes! Thanks to you, I was warm…

1000661108.english: No! That's not what I meant!

1000661109.english: I'm sorry for making you worry!

1000661110.english: - I held Habertrot's shoulders as she bowed her head at a terrifying speed.
1000661110.korean: - 무시무시한 속도로 고개 숙이는 하베트롯의 어깨를 붙잡았다.

1000661112.english: But… since I troubled Your Excellency Commander…

1000661113.english: I don't know how to apologize… uuuuh…

1000661114.english: F-first of all, the coat you lent me—I washed it thoroughly, here it is!
1000661114.korean: 이, 일단 빌려주신 외투는 깨끗이 빨아왔습니다, 여기 있습니다!

1000661115.english: - The coat handed back was far cleaner than when I wore it. Just how meticulously did she wash it?
1000661115.korean: - 건네 받은 외투는 내가 입을 때보다 훨씬 깨끗해졌다. 얼마나 꼼꼼히 빤 걸까.

1000661116.english: I thought you might need it right away, so I returned it as quickly as possible, but…
1000661116.korean: 당장 필요하실 거라 생각해 최대한 빨리 가져왔지만...

1000661117.english: If! If it's alright, could you give me just one more day, and I'll make it even cleaner…!
1000661117.korean: 혹시! 혹시 괜찮으시다면, 하루만 더 시간을 주시면 좀 더 깨끗이...!

1000661118.english: - I changed into the coat Habertrot had brought.
1000661118.korean: - 입던 외투를 하베트롯이 가져온 걸로 갈아 입었다.

1000661120.english: Ah! Do you mean it was better before being washed?!
1000661120.korean: 앗! 혹시 세탁하기 전이 더 낫다는 얘기신가요?

1000661121.english: Another mistake! Because of my prejudice that it just had to be spotless…!
1000661121.korean: 또 실수를! 무조건 깨끗하기만 하면 된다는 선입견 때문에...!

1000661123.english: - I handed Habertrot a few candies from the drawer.
1000661123.korean: - 서랍에 든 사탕 몇 개를 하베트롯에게 건넸다.

1000661127.english: - As she popped the candies into her mouth one by one, the tension in Habertrot's face gradually eased. Maybe I should prepare sweet desserts next time.
1000661127.korean: - 사탕을 하나씩 입에 넣는 하베트롯의 얼굴에 점점 긴장이 풀렸다. 다음엔 달콤한 디저트를 준비해놓을까.

1000661129.english: Ah, yes?! Commander, how did you…?!

1000661130.english: - Actually, Marie and Red Hood know too, but for easily nervous Habertrot, it's better not to say.
1000661130.korean: - 사실은 마리와 레드후드도 알고 있지만, 쉽게 긴장하는 하베트롯을 위해선 밝히지 않는 게 좋겠지.

1000661131.english: I-I see… As expected of Your Excellency Commander. There's nothing you don't know.
1000661131.korean: 그, 그렇군요... 역시 사령관 각하. 모르는 게 없으시군요.

1000661132.english: But it's not hard. On the contrary, it's fun.

1000661133.english: Even though I'm lacking now… when I think that someday I'll be of help to everyone, I feel strength I didn't have before!
1000661133.korean: 지금은 부족하지만... 언젠가 제가 모두에게 도움될 날이 올 거라 생각하면, 없던 힘도 생겨나요!

1000661134.english: Though I still have a long way to go…

1000661135.english: About the thing I was preparing… ah!

1000661136.english: I-I was just about done organizing it, and I was going to tell you, but before that, by any chance…
1000661136.korean: 고, 곧 정리가 끝나서 안 그래도 말씀드리려 했는데... 그 전에 혹시...

1000661137.english: - Habertrot pursed her lips, then looked at me with a flushed face.
1000661137.korean: - 입술을 오물거리던 하베트롯이 빨개진 얼굴로 나를 바라봤다.

1000661138.english: The circled gift on the list… was that you, Commander?
1000661138.korean: 선물 목록에 동그라미... 사령관님이 하신 건가요?

1000661140.english: It was just something I jotted down, but auuugh! Of all times, while I nodded off…! I-I'll erase it right away.
1000661140.korean: 생각나는 대로 적은 건데, 아으으! 하필 잠깐 눈을 붙인 사이...! 그, 금방 지울게요.

1000661142.english: - Since the work related to the date contest was finished yesterday, today is free.
1000661142.korean: - 데이트 공모전에 관련된 업무는 어제 끝내놨으니 오늘 하루는 여유롭다.

1000661143.english: - Sitting in a chair and stretching, I asked.

1000661147.english: - Though I came out early on purpose, Habertrot had already arrived first and was waiting.
1000661147.korean: - 일부러 일찍 나온 나보다 하베트롯이 먼저 도착해서 기다리고 있었다.

1000661148.english: - It was the same uniform as always, but it felt different. Was it new?
1000661148.korean: - 평소와 똑같은 군복 차림이지만 느낌이 다르다. 새 건가?

1000661149.english: - Seeing her check her hair and clothes in the reflection of the fountain's water, I greeted her.
1000661149.korean: - 분수대에 채워진 물을 보고,  머리카락과 복장을 점검하는 하베트롯에게 인사했다.

1000661151.english: - I supported Habertrot as she nearly toppled in surprise.

1000661154.english: D-d-date…! Second Lieutenant me, going on a date with a commander like the sky…!
1000661154.korean: 데, 데이트...! 소위인 제가 하늘 같은 사령관 각하와 데이트...!

1000661155.english: - When I made a slightly disappointed expression, Habertrot squeezed her eyes shut.
1000661155.korean: - 내가 서운하다는 표정을 짓자, 하베트롯이 눈을 꾹 감았다.

1000661156.english: Ah…! No, it's really a date!

1000661157.english: I won't salute! So please, Commander…

1000661158.english: - When I held Habertrot's flustered hands, I felt her trembling. She's really nervous.
1000661158.korean: - 어쩔 줄 몰라 허둥지둥하는 하베트롯의 손을 잡자 떨림이 전해져왔다. 많이 긴장했구나.

1000661161.english: I-I was designed as a soldier from the start… so I don't know what to do in situations like this…
1000661161.korean: 저, 저는 애초에 군인으로 설계돼서... 이럴 땐 뭘 해야 하는지...

1000661163.english: - Afterwards, we wandered around the ark together.
1000661163.korean: - 이후로 하베트롯과 함께 방주 이곳저곳을 돌아다녔다.

1000661164.english: - At first, her nervousness was obvious.

1000661165.english: - But as we explored fun rides, sweet treats, and interesting sights, Habertrot gradually relaxed and began enjoying herself.
1000661165.korean: - 재밌는 놀이기구나 달콤한 간식, 재밌는 볼거리를 구경하는 사이에 어느새 하베트롯도 마음 편히 즐기고 있었다.

1000661167.english: - By evening, the shops closed, and only the lamplights lit the ecological preservation square.
1000661167.korean: - 저녁이 다 되어 점포들이 문을 닫고, 생태 보존 구역 광장에 가로등 불빛만이 켜져있는 시간.

1000661168.english: - Still on our date, we took a final stroll through the garden.
1000661168.korean: - 아직 데이트 중인 우리는 마지막으로 정원을 거닐었다.

1000661169.english: It was really amazing, wasn't it, Commander? I never imagined a house-sized tiger popping out of the chakram!
1000661169.korean: 정말 신기하지 않았나요, 사령관님? 차크람에서 막 집채만한 호랑이가 튀어나올 줄은 상상도 못했어요!

1000661170.english: And the parfait was really delicious too. Sergeant Gnome is really good at cooking.
1000661170.korean: 게다가 파르페도 정말 맛있었구요. 노움 병장님께서는 요리도 정말 잘 하시더라구요.

1000661172.korean: - 거기까지 말한 하베트롯의 얼굴이 딱딱하게 굳어졌다.

1000661173.english: …You went on this date for me, didn't you.

1000661174.english: I should be the one making you happy, but instead, Commander, you…
1000661174.korean: 제가 기쁘게 해드려야 하는데, 오히려 반대로 사령관님이 절...

1000661176.english: - Habertrot, for whom even familiar snacks and games were all new, displayed a full range of emotions.
1000661176.korean: - 나에겐 많이 먹어본 간식도, 놀거리도 전부 처음이었던 하베트롯은 풍부한 감정을 보여줬다.

1000661177.english: - Laughing brightly in excitement, turning pale in surprise.
1000661177.korean: - 신나서 환하게 웃는다거나 놀라서 얼굴이 사색이 된다거나.

1000661178.english: - Because she genuinely enjoyed the date, even I, being with her, felt joy.
1000661178.korean: - 진심으로 데이트를 즐겨주니, 함께 있는 나까지 즐거웠다.

1000661179.english: I still have to improve to be of help…

1000661181.english: That's right. I shouldn't hide anything from Commander.
1000661181.korean: 그렇죠. 사령관님에게 숨기는 게 있어선 안 되죠.

1000661183.english: Actually, my specialty is administration and communications. I was assigned from a branch far from combat.
1000661183.korean: 사실 저는 행정 업무와 정보 통신이 주특기예요. 전투랑은 거리가 있는 병과에서 차출됐죠.

1000661184.english: But being inexperienced in battle, and with my specialty only moderately useful on the Orca, I became anxious.
1000661184.korean: 하지만 전투도 미숙하고, 오르카 호에선 주특기도 어중간한 수준이니 조급해졌어요.

1000661185.english: I need to pull my own weight quickly. Only then won't others have to struggle.
1000661185.korean: 어서 한 사람 몫을 해야 되는데. 그래야 다른 분들이 고생하지 않을 텐데.

1000661186.english: I wonder why I can only do this much, it fills me with self-doubt.
1000661186.korean: 왜 난 이것밖에 하지 못할까, 자괴감이 들더라고요.

1000661189.english: - I told Habertrot, who only knew my successes over three years, about my past failures.
1000661189.korean: - 3년 동안의 성과만 알고 있는 하베트롯에게 내가 실패했던 경험들을 들려줬다.

1000661190.english: - From the failures in supply improvement.

1000661191.english: - Like collapsing from overwork trying to be Santa at Christmas, or directing tactics without considering the traits of combatants.
1000661191.korean: - 크리스마스에 산타가 되려다 과로로 쓰러졌다던지, 전투원의 특성을 고려하지 않고 전술을 지휘했다던지.

1000661192.english: - At first, Habertrot didn't believe me, but gradually listened, and by the end, she was half convinced.
1000661192.korean: - 처음엔 믿지 않던 하베트롯도 어느새 내 이야기를 경청했고, 끝날 때쯤에는 반신반의했다.

1000661193.english: You mean… even Commander had a time like that?

1000661194.english: No! I didn't doubt it, I just couldn't imagine it…
1000661194.korean: 아뇨! 의심하지 않았어요, 단지 상상이 안 돼서...

1000661195.english: To think that even a Commander, whom I've always known as perfect, had such a time…
1000661195.korean: 완벽하시다고만 알아온 사령관님에게도 그런 시절이 있을 줄은...

1000661197.english: - Even newcomers who aren't part of Steel Line stumble for months. That's normal.
1000661197.korean: - 스틸라인이 아니더라도 새로 합류한 이들도 몇 달은 헤맨다. 그게 당연하다.

1000661199.english: - That's natural. And it's okay. Time solves these problems. Until you get used to it, those around you will support you, and by Habertrot's side are Steel Line members.
1000661199.korean: - 그게 당연하다. 그리고 괜찮다. 시간이 지나면 해결되는 문제니까. 익숙해질 때까지 곁에 있는 이들이 지탱해줄 거고, 하베트롯의 옆엔 스틸라인의 대원들이 있다.

1000661201.english: I will work even harder from now on… to live up to Commander's expectations…!
1000661201.korean: 사령관님의 기대에 부응할 수 있게, 앞으로 더 노력...!

1000661203.english: Um, Commander. Then… would it be alright if I…

1000661204.english: worked extra until midnight just this once?

1000661205.english: There were no issues before, and it's only until dawn this time… so…
1000661205.korean: 전에도 별탈 없었고, 이번에만 새벽까지 그런 거니까... 저기...

1000661207.english: - I gently stroked Habertrot's head as she watched me nervously.
1000661207.korean: - 내 눈치를 살피는 하베트롯의 머리를 부드럽게 쓰다듬었다.

1000661210.english: And… now I think I understand.
1000661210.korean: 그리고... 이제 좀 알 것 같아요.

1000661211.english: Why everyone talked so much about Your Excellency Commander… eheheh.
1000661211.korean: 왜 다른 분들이 사령관 각하에 대해서 그렇게 많이 얘기하셨는지... 에헤헷.

1000661213.english: - Habertrot's face turned red as she wiggled her fingers and looked up at me.
1000661213.korean: - 손가락을 꼼지락거리며 나를 올려다보는 하베트롯의 얼굴이 붉어졌다.

1000661214.english: Since the date isn't over yet… so maybe I could… um… oh…
1000661214.korean: 아직 데이트가 끝나지 않았으니까... 그러니까, 혹시 제가 사령관님에게, 그... 오...

1000661217.english: Today was truly enjoyable! Thank you!

1000661218.english: - Habertrot, her face flushed as if it would burst, bowed and then ran back to her quarters like escaping.
1000661218.korean: - 얼굴이 터질 것처럼 붉어진 하베트롯은 고개를 숙여 인사한 뒤, 도망치듯 숙소로 달려갔다.

1000661219.english: - She probably had something else she wanted to say, but what could it have been?
1000661219.korean: - 하고 싶은 말은 따로 있었을 텐데, 대체 뭐였을까.

1000661220.english: - I hope what I said was of some help.
1000661220.korean: - 내가 한 말들이 조금은 도움이 됐으면 좋겠다.

1000661221.english: - I wondered what stories she might share on our next date, and happily returned to my room.
1000661221.korean: - 다음 데이트에서는 또 어떤 이야기를 들려줄까. 행복한 고민을 하며 나도 내 방으로 돌아갔다.

1000661222.english: Did you handle all these enemies alone? Amazing, Second Lieutenant Habertrot!
1000661222.korean: 혼자서 이만한 적을 해치우셨습니까? 대단함다, 하베트롯 소위님!

1000661223.english: Truly, with Second Lieutenant Habertrot by my side, any battlefield is no worry.
1000661223.korean: 역시 하베트롯 소위님과 함께라면 어떤 전장이든 걱정 없어요.

1000661224.english: I'm so happy that Second Lieutenant Habertrot is part of Steel Line!
1000661224.korean: 하베트롯 소위님이 스틸라인 부대여서 너무 행복해요!

1000661226.english: Of course! Second Lieutenant Habertrot is truly the best family.
1000661226.korean: 물론이죠! 하베트롯 소위님은 정말 최고의 가족이에요.

1000661227.english: Promoted to Sergeant… it's an honor to serve alongside you…

1000661228.english: And in no time, we've already come this far…

1000661229.english: You're truly incredible, Second Lieutenant Habertrot.

1000661230.english: No, this much is only natural for a second lieutenant of Steel Line.
1000661230.korean: 아니에요, 이 정도야 스틸라인 부대의 소위로서 당연한 걸요.

1000661231.english: Compared to Captain Marie, Commander Red Hood, and Colonel Phoenix, I…
1000661231.korean: 마리 대장님과 레드후드 연대장님, 피닉스 대령님에 비하면 저는...

1000661233.english: She finished faster than us? Really a second lieutenant?
1000661233.korean: 우리보다 빨리 끝냈는데? 정말 소위 맞아?

1000661234.english: As expected of Second Lieutenant Habertrot.

1000661236.english: I've known for a while about the efforts Habertrot has put in.
1000661236.korean: 하베트롯 소위가 노력해 온 건 전부터 알고 있었지.

1000661237.english: I expected remarkable growth… but I miscalculated.
1000661237.korean: 괄목할 만한 성장을 이뤄낼 거라 예상했지만... 빗나갔군.

1000661238.english: She's an even more extraordinary talent than I anticipated.
1000661238.korean: 예상했던 것보다 훨씬 대단한 인재니 말이야.

1000661241.english: That I, so inexperienced, could grow this far is all thanks to everyone believing in me and waiting!
1000661241.korean: 미숙한 제가 여기까지 성장할 수 있었던 건 전부 여러분께서 믿고 기다려주셔서예요!

1000661242.english: If you hadn't been here, I would have… ah, and Commander too…
1000661242.korean: 만약 여러분들이 안 계셨다면 저는... 아, 그리고 사령관님도...

1000661244.english: Commander?! Why come all the way to the battlefield…?

1000661245.english: I came because I was worried about Habertrot.

1000661247.english: Of course, it's natural to worry when you're in a relationship.

1000661251.english: S-suddenly saying that…! How am I supposed to… with Your Excellency Commander…
1000661251.korean: 가, 갑자기 그렇게 말씀하셔도...! 제가 어떻게 사령관 각하랑...

1000661252.english: I can't live without you anymore. Please, I'm begging you.
1000661252.korean: 난 이제 너 없으면 못 살아. 제발, 부탁이야.

1000661254.english: Actually, I too… from when I went on a date with Your Excellency Commander… no, with Big Brother… I've been waiting for this day…! Ugh?
1000661254.korean: 사실 저도 사령관 각하랑... 아니, 오빠랑 데이트할 때부터 이 날을...! 웁?

1000661255.english: Shh, stop. Don't say a word, my little kitten.
1000661255.korean: 쉿, 그만. 아무 말하지 마, 나의 아기 고양이.

1000661257.english: I love you. Can I hold you tight?

1000661260.english: I love you… eheheh… I love you too…

1000661263.english: - After the date, Habertrot no longer dozed while standing.
1000661263.korean: - 데이트가 끝난 뒤, 하베트롯이 선 채로 조는 일은 사라졌다.

1000661264.english: - She became less tense than before and more accustomed to her work, but I still heard she was overworking until dawn, so I came by…
1000661264.korean: - 긴장도 전보다 덜하게 됐고, 일에도 익숙해졌지만 아직도 새벽까지 무리한다는 소식이 들려서 찾아와봤는데...

1000661265.english: - I gently tapped Habertrot's shoulder as she slept among stacks of books and documents.
1000661265.korean: - 서적과 서류 더미 사이에서 잠든 하베트롯의 어깨를 두드렸다.

1000661268.english: Big Brotheraaa~ hold me tight like just now… eheheh… quickly…
1000661268.korean: 오빠아~ 빨리 방금처럼 꼭 껴안아주세요... 에헤헷... 빨리요오...

1000661270.english: Could it be…? Not a dream, ahhhhhh!

1000661273.english: Making such a ridiculous mistake… disqualified as a second lieutenant…
1000661273.korean: 이런 어처구니 없는 실수를 하다니, 소위 실격이에요...

1000661275.english: A promise? Uh… has it already been that late?
1000661275.korean: 약속이요? 어... 설마 벌써 시간이 그렇게?

1000661276.english: I… got so absorbed I didn't notice…

1000661278.english: - At Habertrot's flustered reaction, I nearly let out a laugh.
1000661278.korean: - 당황하는 하베트롯의 반응에 하마터면 웃음이 새어나올 뻔했다.

1000661279.english: - We looked together at the open manual on the desk. Indeed, this part is difficult to understand alone.
1000661279.korean: - 책상에  펼쳐져 있는 교본을 함께 들여다봤다. 확실히 이 부분은 혼자서 이해하기 힘들지.

1000661280.english: Huh?! No! You go in first, Commander. I'll tidy up and come in.
1000661280.korean: 네?! 아니에요! 먼저 들어가세요, 사령관님. 저도 정리하고 들어갈게요.

1000661284.english: - Finally relaxed, Habertrot began asking one by one about things she was curious about.
1000661284.korean: - 그제야 긴장이 풀린 하베트롯은 궁금했던 것들을 하나씩 물어봐왔다.

1000661285.english: - Her questions matched the things I struggled with when I had just become Commander.
1000661285.korean: - 그 궁금점들은 내가 갓 사령관이 되어 몰라서 헤매던 것과 일치했고.

1000661286.english: - Seeing me laugh unconsciously at the memory, Habertrot panicked, wondering if she'd made another mistake.
1000661286.korean: - 그 때가 떠올라 무심코 웃음을 터트린 나를 본 하베트롯은 자신이 또 뭔가를 실수한 건 아닌지 우왕좌왕했다.

1000661287.english: - In truth, today too there's a mountain of work left to do…
1000661287.korean: - 사실 오늘도 처리해야 할 업무가 산더미처럼 남아있지만...

1000661288.english: - But seeing Habertrot smile brightly as she learned bit by bit, I decided to worry about later work later.
1000661288.korean: - 하나씩 배울 때마다 환하게 미소 짓는 하베트롯을 보고, 나중 일은 나중에 생각하기로 했다.

1000661289.english: - The blazing sun, the distant horizon. And…
1000661289.korean: - 내리쬐는 태양과, 멀리 보이는 수평선. 그리고…

1000661290.english: - The gratifying sweat running down my forehead.
1000661290.korean: - 기분 좋게 이마를 흐르는 노동의 결실.

1000661291.english: - Wiping sweat from my neck with a towel, I looked at the lake.
1000661291.korean: - 목에 걸친 수건으로 땀을 닦으며 호수를 바라봤다.

1000661292.english: - Last winter, after my duties were seized, I enjoyed a pleasant vacation.
1000661292.korean: - 지난 겨울, 업무를 압수당한 나는 즐거운 휴가를 보냈다.

1000661293.english: - But… even after the vacation ended, the panel didn't return to my hands… and I eventually fell to a mere ordinary laborer.
1000661293.korean: - 하지만… 휴가 기간이 끝나고 나서도 패널은 내 손에 돌아오지 않았고… 나는 결국 평범한 노동력 1로 전락.

1000661294.english: - I voluntarily joined internal civil engineering work.
1000661294.korean: - 자발적으로 진내 토목 공사에 투입되기에 이르렀다.

1000661295.english: Most of it was done by AGS units, though.

1000661296.english: - Vanilla came up without scoffing at my words and wiped my face with a cold towel.
1000661296.korean: - 바닐라는 내 말에 코웃음도 치지 않고 다가와 차가운 수건으로 얼굴을 닦아 주었다.
